Dear applicant,



We run a dropshipping business with multiple stores in different countries.



We are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. We are seeking great candidates that will represent the company with great customer service and dedication.



Therefore, please apply the word strawberry before you introduce yourself. Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we feel is necessary for this job.



This is a Customer Support job where you would have to follow a very clear process to keep our customers happy, but which will become very simple when you understand every step.



MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF THESE PLATFORMS:

Responding to customer
s regarding refunds, tracking numbers, FAQs.

Skilled in reporting into google sheets.

Demonstrate a high level of professionalism at all times.

s within this timeframe.

 templates

This means that in the ideal situation you are currently not working for other full-time jobs



Ideally, you'll have some experience with customer support, but ultimately we want to work with someone who loves helping people and is interested in handling customer support issues. We don't want any inconsistency in the
s exchanged with the customer.

sent out the same

title: Operations & Support Specialist
description:
The Role:

We are looking for a reliable Operations Support person to handle the essential daily tasks at Adventures in Speech Pathology. You will be the person behind the scenes making sure our systems are updated, and our customers get the help they need. It’s a vital, hands-on role in a small team where your attention to detail keeps the day-to-day moving.



Commitment & Growth: This is a long-term position for a committed professional, not a "gig" or short-term project. We are looking for someone to start in a part-time capacity, with the ability to scale as the business expands. Beyond the core areas listed below, you will also provide general operational support for other business needs as they arise.



Key Responsibilities:

High-Quality Customer Support (Help Scout)

Manage the team inbox with a focus on high-quality, empathetic service.

Triage 45–60 tickets per week, relating to our digital downloads shop, website, online courses, professional development events, our app, and more!

Handle technical account issues, including account merges, product access problems, password resets, and "My Account" resolutions.

Utilize saved replies where available.



E-commerce & Product Hygiene (WooCommerce):

Maintain our digital storefront to a high standard by performing regular shop audits, updating product descriptions/thumbnails, uploading product updates, and managing site-wide sales.

Update product SEO, delete old media files to keep the site lean, and ensure all product digital assets are correctly linked and functioning properly.



Event Coordination Support & Logistics:

Handle the digital management of professional development events.

Reconcile ticket sales against attendee lists and manage large volumes of automated
 communications.

Coordinate attendee dietary requirements and ensure professional certificates are generated and distributed accurately.



Online Course Operations & Student Support (Zenler):

Champion this growing area of our business from the support side.

Act as a dedicated advocate for our students' success, ensuring every learner has a seamless experience from enrollment through to completion.

Handle manual student enrollments and manage course access extensions while maintaining full oversight of automated
 communications triggered by the platform.

Work with our operations manager on building out online courses.



AI-Driven Systems & Data:

Utilize AI (Gemini and Claude) extensively to stay organized and efficient.

Act as a proficient AI user capable of advanced prompting and using these tools at a high level to troubleshoot workflows or refine data.

Extract CSV data from 
 and meeting notes for analysis to help identify new business opportunities and take action items from our boards to completion with an AI-assisted workflow.



Technical Stack & Tools

Central Hub: 
 (All work lives here)

Core Systems: Help Scout, WooCommerce, WordPress, Google Workspace, and Zenler

AI Tools: Gemini and Claude

Hardware you require: A computer with a dual-screen setup and good internet access is non-negotiable.



Candidate Profile:

Resourceful Problem Solver: You are a "figure-it-out" person who uses SOPs and AI at an advanced level to troubleshoot before escalating.

Meeting Culture: Punctual attendance at our high-frequency meetings on Australian time (initially Mon/Wed/Fri) is critical to maintaining our high standards and growth.

Autonomous Operator: You take ownership of action items on our boards and move them to completion without needing constant reminders.

Committed: You are looking for a long-term home where you can grow alongside the business and handle diverse operational tasks.

Must have WooCommerce skills and experience.



TO APPLY: Please reach out with your experience and follow these instructions exactly:



Include the word "RESOURCEFUL" in your subject line so I know you’ve read this through.



Shoot me a quick message explaining why you are the right fit for our specific business

---------------------------------------



TESTING & VALIDATION 



---------------------------------------



Before the project is considered done, you must:







? Send test
s for every flow and confirm triggers work correctly

s fire at the right 
nt

WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

? Proven Klaviyo experience — flows you've built before

HOW TO APPLY

2. Your monthly rate

mber.

title: Marketing Specialist
description:
Position: Marketing Strategist / Specialist

Reports to: COO, ILX Travel



About ILX Travel 



ILX Travel is a premier luxury travel concierge company dedicated to designing bespoke travel experiences—resorts, private villas, yacht charters, cultural journeys, cruises, and wellness retreats. As a Virtuoso affiliate, ILX provides exclusive privileges, amenities, and insider access. 



Mission, Vision, Values & Brand Promise 



Mission: 

To design extraordinary, personalized travel experiences that enrich our clients’ lives through discovery, comfort, and authentic connection—delivered with exceptional service, expertise, and care. 



Vision: 

To become the most trusted luxury travel partner for discerning travelers seeking curated journeys, exclusive access, and seamless service. 



Values: 

Excellence • Integrity • Creativity • Client?Centered Service • Collaboration • Innovation • Continuous Improvement 



Brand Promise: 

Effortless luxury, thoughtfully curated. 



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Strategist leads the development, execution, and optimization of ILX Travel’s marketing strategy. This role blends strategic planning, creative brand development, and data?driven decision-making. Ideal candidates must have a deep understanding of the travel and luxury industries, strong marketing leadership, and the ability to guide execution across internal tea
mbers and external partners. 



Key Responsibilities: 

I. Marketing Strategy & Planning 

-Develop and maintain an annual marketing strategy aligned with ILX Travel’s business goals 

-Define target markets, luxury traveler personas, and positioning within the travel industry 

-Identify and prioritize high-impact marketing initiatives 



II. Brand, Messaging & Campaign Direction 

-Lead brand messaging, storytelling, and positioning for ILX Travel 

-Ensure consistent brand voice across website,
, social media, partnerships, and campaigns 

-Plan and oversee multi-channel marketing campaigns 



III. Performance, Data & Optimization 

-Define KPIs and success metrics for marketing initiatives 

-Monitor performance, analyze results, and optimize campaigns for ROI 

-Strengthen CRM workflows and marketing automation (Zoho CRM or similar) 



IV. Cross-Functional & Vendor Leadership 

-Partner with sales teams to convert MQLs. 

-Provide strategic direction to internal contributors, agencies, creators, and vendors 

-Manage marketing budgets and recommend resource allocation 



Required Qualifications: 

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field 

-5+ years of experience in marketing strategy, preferably within travel, hospitality, luxury services, or premium consumer brands 

-Experience in leading marketing strategy and decision-making  

-Strong understanding of digital marketing, SEO/SEM, paid media, and content strategy 

-Experience working with CRM and marketing automation platforms 

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills 



Preferred Qualifications: 

-Prior experience within the travel industry or luxury travel sector 

-Familiarity with Virtuoso or similar luxury travel networks 

-Experience managing agencies, partnerships, or influencer collaborations 



Interested applicants are encouraged to apply via the following link:


/4rYl61U



Please note that only applications submitted through this link will be entertained.

title: Job Search Operations Manager — Job Placement / 6 Client Accounts (Remote)
description:
Job Description:



Capital Career Club is a done-for-you job placement service based in Warsaw, Poland. We help international professionals land corporate jobs in Poland by running their entire job search for them — applications, recruiter outreach, and LinkedIn content. Our clients hand over their LinkedIn, their dedicated job-search
, and their strategy. We execute end to end. They show up to interviews. We make those interviews happen.



We are hiring one Operations Manager to own the daily execution of 6 active client job searches running at the same time.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You are not a typist. You are not a data entry clerk. You are the person who makes sure 6 professionals wake up to recruiter replies, interview invitations, and a job search that is visibly moving — every single day.



You use Claude AI and proven CCC templates to generate tailored cover letters, outreach messages, and LinkedIn posts fast. Then you send, log, track, and report with zero gaps.



We manage outcomes, not screen time. If the KPIs are hit and the quality is there, the work is done.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY



Job Applications — This is the core of your day



Log into each client's LinkedIn and dedicated job-search
 every morning. Search for open roles using each client's confirmed keyword list and target company list. Use Claude AI to generate a tailored cover letter and application answers in the client's voice — under 3 minutes per role. Submit via LinkedIn Easy Apply, Pracuj.pl, or direct company career sites. Log every single application immediately with the company name, role title, platform, method, status, and follow-up date. No log means it did not happen. This rule is non-negotiable.



LinkedIn and
 Outreach



Identify recruiters, HR managers, and relevant employees at target companies. Use Claude to generate personalised LinkedIn DMs and
 outreach in batches. Send connection requests with a note and structured follow-ups at Day 5 if there is no reply. Log every single touch with the name, company, channel, date, reply status, and next step.



LinkedIn Content Support



Draft posts in each client's voice using their Brand Content Brief and Claude AI. Place all drafts into the Content Approval Dashboard with a suggested publish date. Publish only after explicit written approval — never auto-publish under any circumstances. Handle basic post engagement including likes and simple replies according to each client's guidelines.



Tracking and Reporting



Keep all 6 Application Tracking Sheets 100% updated before you log off every single day. No backlogs. Check each client's dedicated inbox multiple times daily and file all recruiter replies, assessments, interview invites, and offers into the correct folders. Prepare one structured weekly performance report per client using a provided template. All 6 reports must be submitted to the founder every Friday before 17:00 Warsaw time without exception.



Escalation



You never guess and you never improvise on high-stakes situations. You escalate to the founder within 30 minutes when a recruiter or hiring manager contacts a client directly, when an interview is confirmed or offered at any stage, when a job offer or draft contract appears, when a LinkedIn account is flagged or restricted, when a recruiter asks about salary or visa status or availability, and when a client goes silent for 48 hours or more or raises a serious concern. Prebuilt escalation scripts are provided for every one of these scenarios. You use them every time.



DAILY TARGETS WHEN ALL 6 ACCOUNTS ARE FULLY LIVE



Per client per day:



Around 22 tailored job applications submitted



10 to 12 personalised outreach messages sent



1 LinkedIn post drafted and submitted for approval (minimum 2 per week per client)



100% of all actions logged in the tracking sheet same day



Across all 6 clients per day:



Around 132 applications submitted



60 to 72 outreach messages sent



6 or more LinkedIn posts drafted for approval



Zero gaps in any tracking sheet



6 weekly reports submitted every Friday before 17:00 Warsaw time



You ramp up gradually. You are not handed 6 accounts on Day 1. The build-up is structured and fully supported by the founder.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Claude AI for cover letters, outreach messages, LinkedIn posts, and weekly reports. Full training is provided from Day 1.



LinkedIn for client profile management, job applications, outreach, and content publishing.



Gmail for dedicated job-search inboxes per client with structured folder systems.



Google Sheets for Application Tracking Sheets, performance dashboards, and the VA Operations Master Sheet.



Skool for DFY client resources and weekly group interview-prep sessions.



WhatsApp and
 for internal communication with the founder only. You never contact clients directly under any circumstances.



YOU ARE THE RIGHT PERSON FOR THIS ROLE IF



You are based in the Philippines or a closely aligned time zone with a stable and reliable internet connection. This is a hard requirement with no exceptions.



Your written English is strong. All work is in English serving international professionals and Polish corporate recruiters.



You have experience managing LinkedIn profiles, running outreach campaigns, or appointment-setting. This is a strong advantage.



You are comfortable working in Google Sheets and executing detailed SOPs precisely and consistently every day.



You are confident using AI tools or genuinely excited to learn fast. We train you on Claude fully but daily execution with it is your job from Week 1.



You can manage 6 client accounts in parallel and hold every detail across all of them without being chased.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



You need daily reminders to complete your tasks.



You go quiet when there is a problem instead of flagging it immediately.



You treat punctuality and deadlines as approximate.



You make excuses instead of finding solutions.



We hired for this role recently and parted ways early due to reliability issues. We are not looking for the most impressive background. We are looking for someone who shows up on time, hits their numbers, flags problems before they become fires, and takes genuine pride in clean and accurate work.



COMPENSATION



Months 1 and 2 — Training and Ramp-Up



Around $400 USD per month base while you learn the full system, tools, and SOPs with daily support and guidance from the founder.



From Month 3 — After Ramp-Up



Base salary reviewed and increased to $600 to $900 USD per month depending on reliability, quality, and KPI performance.



Performance Bonuses — Active From Day 1



$5 bonus for every confirmed interview booked for any client.

$20 bonus for every accepted job offer for any client.

$50 flat portfolio bonus when all 6 clients hit 80% or more of their weekly KPIs for 4 consecutive weeks.



Your upside grows directly with client results. The better you execute, the more you earn.



Example Month 1: $400 base + 12 interviews ($60) + 1 offer ($20) = $480

Example Month 2: $400 base + 20 interviews ($100) + 3 offers ($60) = $560



Payment is monthly via Wise or GCash on the 1st of each month.



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message with the following three things only:



Your name and location



Two short samples of outreach messages or LinkedIn posts you have written — or write fresh ones specifically for this application



One sentence on why this role fits you right now



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a small paid trial task using Claude AI — generate a cover letter and outreach messages from a sample client brief. This replaces a traditional interview. We assess on execution, not conversation.



Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: Monday to Saturday, up to 8 hours per day

Hours: All tasks completed by 18:00 Warsaw time (CEST) daily

Location: Remote — Philippines strongly preferred

Start Date: Immediate

title: Appointment Setter (UK Market) – Calls, SMS & CRM Support
description:
About Us:



Humble Fox is a UK-based marketing agency helping gyms and fitness studios generate leads and grow their memberships using Meta ads and automated follow-up systems.



We generate the leads — your job is to contact them, build trust, and book them into appointments.



Role Overview:



We’re looking for a confident and reliable Appointment Setter to handle inbound leads for our clients.



You will be calling leads, following up via SMS, and updating our CRM daily. This is a performance-driven role where consistency and communication are key.



Key Responsibilities:

Call new leads and book them into appointments

Follow up leads via SMS (and occasional WhatsApp)

Handle “no answer” leads with consistent follow-up (multiple attempts)

Update CRM (GoHighLevel) with accurate notes and statuses

Manage pipeline stages (No Answer, Callback, Booked, etc.)

Complete basic admin tasks as required

Must-Have Requirements:

Clear, fluent English with a neutral or British-sounding accent (VERY IMPORTANT)

Confident and natural on the phone (not robotic or overly scripted)

Strong communication and listening skills

Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment

Comfortable working 9am–5pm UK time (4pm–12am Philippines)

Organized, consistent, and able to follow systems

Nice to Have (Not Required):

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

Previous appointment setting or customer service experience

Experience speaking with UK-based customers

Compensation:

Base Salary: $750/month

Commission: $1 per booked appointment

Probation Period (First 3 Months):

Salary + commission structure applies

Performance will be reviewed after 3 months

Post-Probation:

Opportunity for increased compensation based on performance

Potential for higher commission and role growth

Working Hours:

Full-time

Monday to Friday

9:00am – 5:00pm UK time

How to Apply (IMPORTANT):



To be considered, you must submit a 60-second Loom video answering:



Your name and location

Your experience with calls / customer service

Why you’d be a good fit for this role



Applications without a Loom video will NOT be considered.



How to Record Your Loom Video (If You’ve Never Used It):

Go to 

 and create a free account

Click “New Video”

Choose “Camera Only” (face recording)

Record your 60-second introduction

Click “Stop Recording”

Copy the video link

Paste the link in your application



???? Keep it simple — no editing needed. Just speak clearly and confidently.



Final Step:



Start your application with the word FOX so we know you’ve read everything.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

The Customer Service Representative will ensure a positive customer experience with Haulla services by collaborating with Affiliates to address and resolve customer issues. This includes, but is not limited to:



- Organizing and managing pick-up schedules.

- Ensuring timely and efficient service through effective communication with customers and Affiliates.

- Resolving missed pick-up issues and handling other customer service-related concerns.

- Identifying bottlenecks in current workflows and proactively suggesting improvements to systems or business processes.



What We're Looking For

This is a full-time remote position



- Proactive Problem Solvers: We value individuals who take initiative to identify issues and actively work to fix them.

- Native-level English Fluency: You must be able to communicate naturally and fluidly with U.S.-based clients and partners.

- Full-time Commitment: Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST), Monday to Friday.

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills.

- Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus.



** Please note: Following your start, there will be a 2-week paid probationary period to ensure a mutual fit.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements)

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Compensation  

- Base pay: USD $4/hour

- Performance-based commission structure



Interested applicants may apply through the following Google form :

title: Deal Retention Specialist
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do



- Win Back & Retain: Proactively engage with customers at risk of cancelling; use your communication and sales expertise to address their concerns, demonstrate value, and flip a potential churn into a "win-back."

- End-to-End Ownership: Manage the entire customer lifecycle from the 
nt a service change request is received until it is fully resolved. You will be the primary point of contact, ensuring a seamless transition and high satisfaction.

- Modifications: Support service upgrades, downgrades, and contract modifications while identifying opportunities to facilitate renewals.

- Excellence: Communicate proactively to resolve complex issues, ensuring every customer feels heard and supported for the long term.



What We’re Looking For



This is a full-time remote position

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST)

- Sales-Driven Mindset: Prior experience in sales or a high-stakes retention role is a strong plus. You should be comfortable "closing" the customer on staying with us.

- Native-level English fluency

- Fluency in Spanish is highly preferred.

- Familiarity with CRM tools (specifically HubSpot) and Google Sheets is a plus.

- Problem-Solving Grit: A "can-do" attitude with the ability to turn a negative customer experience into a positive outcome.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements)

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Compensation

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus

title: Senior Sylius / Symfony Developer
description:
About Us



We are building an innovative, upcoming online marketplace. We are moving away from traditional auction models to a dual-sales approach: "Buy It Now" and "Make an Offer."



We operate a full-service consignment model where we handle the physical inventory, inspecting, photographing, and storing the goods, while providing a seamless digital experience for both buyers and sellers. Our platform will integrate advanced features like a digital wallet for sale proceeds, hybrid payments, complex shipping logistics (including "Hold in Cellar"), and multi-channel sales via Google Shopping, Amazon Marketplace and eBay.



We are a small, experienced founding team looking for a highly skilled technical partner to build the core platform.



The Role



We are seeking a Senior Sylius / Symfony Developer to architect and build the platform from the ground up. You will be responsible for taking our detailed technical specifications and turning them into a robust, scalable, and secure e-commerce marketplace.



This is not a standard e-commerce build. You will be developing complex custom modules on top of the Sylius framework to handle our unique business logic.



Key Responsibilities



• Platform Architecture: Design and implement the core platform using Sylius and Symfony.

• Custom Module Development: Build sophisticated custom modules, including:



• Offer Engine: A state machine-driven system allowing buyers to submit offers and sellers to accept/reject them.

• Wallet & Hybrid Payments: A digital wallet system for sellers to hold proceeds, integrated with Stripe Connect for complex payouts and hybrid (wallet + card) checkout flows.

• Warehousing & Logistics: A backend module to manage physical inventory, barcode generation, storage locations, and consolidated shipping ("Hold in Cellar").

• Multi-Channel Integrations: Automated feeds for Google Shopping and a comprehensive two-way integration with the eBay API.

• API Development: Design and build RESTful APIs to support a future mobile application.

• Third-Party Integrations: Integrate with Stripe Connect, shipping providers, and potentially external identity/age verification services.

• Quality Assurance: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure platform stability and security.



Required Skills & Experience



• Deep Sylius Expertise: Proven experience building complex, custom e-commerce platforms using Sylius. You must understand how to extend Sylius core components, state machines, and resource management.

• Symfony Mastery: Strong background in PHP 8+ and the Symfony framework.

• Marketplace Experience: Previous experience building multi-vendor marketplaces or platforms with complex payment splitting (Stripe Connect experience is highly desirable).

• API Design: Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs.

• Database Design: Strong SQL skills and experience with Doctrine ORM.

• Frontend Integration: While this is primarily a backend role, you should be comfortable working with Twig templates and integrating frontend assets.

• Testing: Commitment to automated testing (PHPUnit, Behat).



Work Setup



• Flexible hours: We are outcome-focused. Delivery matters more than specific hours logged.

• Collaboration: You will work directly with the founders and our UX/UI design team.



Application Questions (Required)



If this sounds like the challenge you've been looking for, please apply with your CV/LinkedIn, links to relevant GitHub repositories or live projects, and answers to the following questions:



1. Sylius Experience: Describe the most complex custom module or feature you have built on top of Sylius. What was the business problem, and how did you solve it technically?

2. Marketplace Payments: Have you worked with Stripe Connect or similar complex payment splitting systems? If so, briefly describe the implementation.

3. State Machines: Our "Make an Offer" feature requires a robust state machine (Pending -> Accepted/Rejected/Expired). How would you approach implementing this within the Sylius ecosystem?

4. MVP Delivery: If you had to deliver the core MVP (Buy It Now + Make an Offer + Basic Stripe integration) in 8-10 weeks, what would be your technical approach and what potential bottlenecks would you anticipate?

5. Availability & Rates: What is your general availability each week, and what is your expected salary?

6. What excites you most about joining a startup team building something new from the ground up?



Please also let us know why you are the right person, explain your experience and tell us why we should hire you.

title: Sales Representative
description:
About Us

Web Dynamics International is a fast-growing full-service digital marketing agency serving over 1,000 clients across four countries, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. We help small and medium-sized businesses build their online presence through social media management, paid advertising, and lead generation.

Founded in 2017, we started with door-to-door sales in Phoenix, Arizona and grew into an international agency with a team of 50+ employees. We are a company built on integrity, communication, and delivering a WOW customer experience to every client we work with.

We are expanding our sales team and are looking for driven, disciplined, and hungry sales representatives to join us full-time.



What You'll Be Doing

As a Sales Representative at Web Dynamics, you will be responsible for contacting inbound leads, running discovery calls, recommending the right package, closing deals, and managing your pipeline through our CRM system.

This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Leads are generated through our paid advertising campaigns, you are NOT cold calling strangers. You are calling people who have already expressed interest in our services.

Your daily responsibilities will include:



Contacting inbound leads through our dialer system

Running discovery to understand the prospect's business and needs

Recommending and presenting the right social media management package

Handling objections and closing deals on the call

Following up consistently with leads in your pipeline

Updating the CRM accurately after every call (notes, dispositions, opportunity value, tags)

Ensuring proper handoff to the onboarding team after every sale

Hitting a minimum of 300 calls per day

Working toward a goal of 50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue



What We're Looking For

We are not looking for order-takers. We are looking for closers  people who are hungry, disciplined, and don't take no for an answer easily.

You are a great fit if you:

Have a strong command of English (spoken and written)  this is non-negotiable as you will be speaking with US, Canadian, Australian, and UK business owners

Are comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls every day

Are coachable and willing to follow a proven sales process

Are self-motivated and don't need someone standing over your shoulder

Have a competitive mindset and are driven by results and commission

Can handle rejection without getting discouraged

Are organized and disciplined with CRM updates and follow-up

Have a quiet, professional workspace with a reliable internet connection

Have a working computer/laptop and headset



Preferred Experience & Skills

Previous sales experience (phone sales preferred)

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM is a big plus

Familiarity with 
 for team communication

Experience working with a US-based company or US clients

Digital marketing or social media knowledge is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Commission on every sale you close  the more you sell, the more you make

Full training provided through our comprehensive sales training portal

A structured, proven sales process with scripts and systems in place

A high-energy team environment with clear performance expectations

Room to grow within a fast-expanding international agency

Consistent leads  you will never have to prospect or cold call



Performance Expectations

We want to be upfront about what is expected here so there are no surprises:

Minimum 300 calls per day

Maximum 3-minute wrap time between calls

50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue is the baseline target

You are expected to be profitable within your first 30 days

Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly

CRM must be updated accurately after every single call

This is a performance-based role. If you show up, follow the process, and put in the work  you will make money. If you are looking for a relaxed job where you can coast, this is not the right fit.



Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (wired preferred)

Quiet, professional workspace with no background noise

Working computer/laptop

Quality headset for calls

Smartphone or ability to use 
 for team communication

Must be available Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Arizona Time (MST)  no exceptions

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative and Cold Call Sales Specialist
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. , calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Responsible for identifying and reaching out to potential clients, scheduling appointments for the sales team, and assisting with the sales process. If you're passionate about building connections (calling strangers non-stop), creating opportunities, and driving growth, this could be the perfect role for you! As a Cold Call Sales Specialist, you will be an integral part of our sales team, helping us connect with potential clients and open doors to exciting business ventures.

-
 Marketing and follow-ups

Qualifications:

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:

This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. , SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,

This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.

Admin & Systems Support

• Use Zoho Books for basic finance/admin tasks

• Log calls, enquiries and updates into CRM

• Check stock availability and coordinate with operations team

• Communicate clearly with internal teams in the UK

• Learn and understand product ranges, colours and finishes



Requirements

• Strong experience in estimating and/or quantity take-offs

• Able to read and understand construction drawings

• Excellent attention to detail

• Strong numerical accuracy

• Organised, reliable and fast

• Good written English

• Able to work full-time, UK hours



Preferred (not essential)

• AutoCAD 2D experience

• 3D CAD or concept modelling

• Experience in construction, cladding, facades or similar



To Apply (MANDATORY):

Include the word VALCAN at the top of your application and provide:



Examples of quantity take-offs you have completed

A sample quotation or pricing document you have produced

What software you use for estimating and take-offs

A short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself

Your internet speed (screenshot)



Applications without these will not be considered.

title: LinkedIn & Email Outreach Specialist ($1200/ month) – Help Us Book Meetings with Elite Clients
description:
We’re a performance marketing company working with serious clients who spend £50,000–£200,000+/month on leads. Now, we’re looking to grow.



We're hiring someone smart, resourceful, and experienced to help us find and connect with top-tier prospects using LinkedIn Sales Navigator + cold
.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. We'll provide you with an industry and ideal client profiles

2. You build your contact/outreach list using Sales Navigator, Google Search, ChatGPT etc.

3. Daily LinkedIn outreach (requests + messages) using Sales Navigator and normal messages/email

4. Writing & sending custom
s to potential leads

5. Building + maintaining clean prospect lists



Following up consistently to generate interest & book calls



(Optional) Assisting with basic call scheduling or follow-up voice notes



What We’re Looking For

> Experience using Sales Navigator to identify high-value leads

> Fluent written English + basic sales copy skills

> Organised, responsive, and takes initiative without handholding



Bonus if you have worked in lead generation, SaaS, B2B, or paid ads industry



This Job Is NOT for You If…

1. You need to be told what to do every day or don't understand how to build a contact list.

2. You’re applying to 50 jobs at once without reading this properly

3. You copy and paste the same application for every role



CHALLENGE - PROVE YOU'VE READ THIS PROPERLY!!!!!!!

To apply, do these 3 things:



1. In your subject line, write: “I’m your LinkedIn &
 Growth Assistant”

2. In your message, include one example of a campaign or outreach you’ve done before that worked well

3. Bonus points if you find our company website or LinkedIn and send 2 example leads you’d reach out to



Pay + Schedule

Full-time preferred (Part-time possible if you're excellent)



Competitive rate + long-term opportunity to grow with us



Flexible hours, but must overlap 2–3 hours/day with UK time (9am–6pm GMT)



We’re a small, fast-growing team. We’re serious about what we do, but we don’t waste time on fluff. If you’re sharp and hungry to grow, we want to hear from you.

title: Social Media Manager – AI-Driven Content Creator
description:
We're building a DTC golf brand focused on performance and community. We're looking for someone who can own our social presence and drive organic traction through creative, AI-powered content.



You'll be our social media operator - creating content across
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. The core of this role is creative direction + AI execution. You're architecting a multi-platform content strategy that lands with our audience and drives organic growth. This means understanding what works on each platform and adapting your approach accordingly.



Key responsibilities:

- Generate social content (reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, carousel posts, static posts) using AI tools (Sora, Kling, Midjourney, etc.)

- Develop creative concepts and narratives that resonate with golfers (men 35 years old +) across different platforms

- Adapt content strategy and messaging for each platform's algorithm and audience behavior

- Write copy and captions optimized for each platform

- Manage posting schedule across all platforms and optimize timing

- Monitor performance metrics on each platform and iterate based on what works

- Optimize/adapt based on trends we're seeing

- Collaborate with the team on brand direction and campaign ideas



What We're Looking For

- Strong creative instincts - you understand what makes content stop the scroll

- Proficiency with AI content tools (video generation: Sora, Kling; image: Midjourney, DALL-E; text: ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

- Ability to write for a specific demographic (our audience is experienced golfers, 35+, who care about performance)

- Comfortable with iteration and A/B testing different content approaches

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant: FBA, Private Label Specialist
description:
Position: Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant

Our Business Model: Private Label (not Wholesale, Online Arbitrage)

Full-time. 40 hours each week. Please do not apply if you are holding other jobs.

Remote (Work-from-home)



REQUIREMENTS:

-FEMALE applicants only

-Must have proven work experience as an Amazon VA

-Must have a reliable, fully functional computer suitable for daily work

-Must have a stable internet connection with a minimum speed of 20 Mbps

-Strong communication skills, with proficiency in written and spoken English

-Strong research and analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven improvements

-Detail-oriented and highly organized, with a high level of accuracy

-Strong time management skills, with the ability to consistently meet deadlines

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently while collaborating with a team

-Willing to learn, adapt, and take on new responsibilities over time



RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Manage daily Amazon Seller Central operations, including customer service, case management, account health monitoring, and resolving account or listing issues

-Perform keyword and competitor research to create and optimize high-converting Amazon listings (titles, bullet points, backend search terms) using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or DataDive

-Create and improve Amazon listing images and Premium A+ Content using Photoshop, Canva, and AI creative tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Studio

-Create and edit high-quality product videos using Filmora, CapCut, Premiere Pro, and AI video tools such as Sora and Flow Veo

-Monitor and manage inventory levels, shipments, and stock replenishment to avoid stockouts or overstock

-Experience with Amazon PPC (campaign setup and optimization) is a strong plus



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

1. Asia working hours

2. Work-from-home setup

3. Bonus: 13th Month

4. Bonus: Year end

5. Long-term opportunity with career growth

6. Supportive and collaborative team



HOW TO APPLY:

If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please submit your applications with the following in the correct order:

1. Cover Letter

2. CV with your education and work experience in chronological order.

3. Attach your work portfolio: relevant work samples

Join our team and grow with us!

title: Meta Ads Creative & Media Buying Specialist (Funnel Dropshipping)
description:
Job Vacancy: Meta Ads Creative & Media Buying Specialist (E-commerce / Dropshipping)



We are looking for a highly skilled Meta Ads specialist who understands how to turn products into profitable, scalable campaigns.



This is a performance-driven role. You should have a strong background in direct response marketing, know how to create high-converting ad creatives, and be confident in managing and scaling campaigns based on data.



About Us



We build one-product e-commerce stores focused on problem-solving products, primarily in the health sector.



Our setup includes:



Funnel-based stores built in Funnelish

Advertorial-style landing pages

A strong focus on direct response marketing



Our objective is simple: identify winning products and scale them aggressively through Meta Ads.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for creative production & strategy. 

You will also be part of media buying In collaboration with the founders.



This means:



Creating ad creatives that convert

Managing campaigns and optimizing performance

Scaling winning products and cutting losing ones



You should understand the full flow — from hook and headline to metrics and scaling decisions.



Key Responsibilities

Creative

Develop high-converting image and video ads

Write strong, direct response headlines on creatives

Create hooks and angles based on product pain points

Analyze winning ads and replicate effective concepts

Continuously test and improve creatives

Media Buying & Optimization

Launch and manage Meta Ads campaigns (CBO structure)

Monitor and analyze CTR, CPM, CPC, CPA, and ROAS

Identify underperforming ads and take action

D
 when to scale, kill, or duplicate campaigns

Execute scaling strategies for winning products



Requirements

Proven experience with Meta Ads in dropshipping or direct response e-commerce

Strong understanding of what makes products convert through paid ads

Experience creating ad creatives (not just editing)

Solid knowledge of hooks, angles, and scroll-stopping concepts

Ability to analyze data and make performance-driven decisions

Experience with CBO campaign structures and scaling

Fluent in English



Preferred

Experience with Funnelish or similar funnel builders

Experience with advertorial funnels

Background in product research



What We Offer

A performance-driven environment focused on results

Direct involvement in scaling winning products

Long-term opportunity

Performance-based incentives



How to Apply

To confirm you have read this job post carefully, start your application with the word “Winner” and answer the following question: How would you improve a Meta ad with a CTR below 1%?

title: Implementation Specialist
description:
We are seeking an Implementation Specialist in the healthcare technology industry. This role is ideal for a technically skilled professional who can translate complex healthcare requirements into scalable, enterprise-level applications. The successful candidate will work closely with clients to design, build, and deploy HIPAA-compliant solutions using a modern no-code and AI-powered platform, ensuring rapid and high-quality implementation.



Job Responsibilities:

-Collaborate with clients to gather and understand application requirements and workflows.

-Configure, build, and deploy custom applications based on client needs.

-Lead the full “Design-to-Launch” lifecycle, including database architecture and system setup.

-Translate clinical and operational requirements into application logic, automations, and integrations.

-Troubleshoot implementation issues and guide clients through onboarding and setup processes.

-Maintain clear and consistent communication with clients through meetings and progress updates.

-Work with internal teams to resolve complex technical challenges.

-Ensure timely delivery of applications within accelerated implementation timelines.

-Provide strategic input to stakeholders, including CIOs and operations leaders, to refine product vision.



Qualifications:

-Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.

-Minimum of 5 years of experience in full-stack or web application development.

-Strong proficiency in SQL and relational databases.

-Experience with healthcare applications or healthcare-related systems is an advantage.

-Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).

-Strong client-facing experience and professional presentation skills.

-Solid understanding of UI/UX principles.

-Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities.



Requirements:

-Updated Resume/CV.

-Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, remote environment.

-Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

-UPS/battery backup to ensure uninterrupted productivity.



Benefits:

-Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

-Remote work flexibility.

-Career advancement opportunities in a growing tech-driven environment.

-HMO coverage for the employee and immediate family members.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines!

title: Safety Compliance Engineer - Remote (UK/Ireland Experience Required)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, delivering comprehensive solutions across the construction and renovation sectors. Our services range from general maintenance and office fit-outs to full-scale renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, flooring, partitions, and MEP (Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing) systems.



With decades of industry experience, we are committed to delivering high-quality workmanship and reliable service to both residential and commercial clients nationwide. Our strong reputation is built on attention to detail, safety compliance, and our ability to bring client visions to life while maintaining the highest industry standards.



Role Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented Health & Safety / Compliance Coordinator to support our growing operations. This role focuses on ensuring all construction projects adhere to strict health & safety standards, regulatory requirements, and internal compliance procedures.



The successful candidate will play a key role in preparing safety documentation, supporting project teams, and maintaining accurate compliance records. You will work closely with project managers, site teams, and stakeholders to ensure safe and efficient project delivery.



Key Responsibilities

Health & Safety Documentation



Prepare Risk Assessments and Method Statements (RAMS) to support safe work practices across all projects

Develop Construction Stage Plans outlining safety procedures, responsibilities, and control measures

Assist in preparing PSDP (Preliminary Safety and Health Plans) and PSCS (Construction Stage Safety Plans) documentation

Ensure all documentation aligns with Irish health & safety and construction regulations



Compliance & Record Management



Maintain, review, and update all health & safety and compliance documentation

Ensure all records are accurate, current, and audit-ready

Organize and maintain safety files, reports, and compliance records for easy access



Project Coordination & Support



Coordinate with project managers, contractors, and stakeholders to ensure safety requirements are implemented

Support project teams in meeting compliance standards throughout all project stages

Assist with general safety administration and compliance-related tasks



Monitoring & Reporting



Conduct video reviews of site activities and training materials to ensure compliance with safety standards

Produce detailed reports based on site Health & Safety audits

Identify potential risks and support the implementation of corrective actions



Project Scheduling & Systems



Use 
 to manage project timelines, tasks, and compliance tracking

Support workflow coordination and ensure timely completion of safety-related deliverables



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Experience preparing RAMS and construction safety documentation

Knowledge of PSDP and PSCS processes (preferred)

Familiarity with Irish health & safety regulations in construction

Experience managing compliance documents and audit records

title: Direct Response Copywriter
description:
Job Title: Direct Response Copywriter (E-commerce & Funnels)



We are looking for a sharp, conversion-obsessed Direct Response Copywriter to join our team. This isn’t a role for "brand" writers who focus on vibes and aesthetics; we need a strategist who lives for the click, the add-to-cart, and the "Thank You" page.



You will be responsible for crafting high-stakes, long-form sales letters and architecting the flow of our sales funnels. Whether we are selling health-related products or digital courses (like breathwork), your goal is the same: deeply understand the human on the other side of the screen and compel them to take action.



The Core Mission

• Master the Long-Form: Research and write high-converting, text-based sales letters (VSLs/TSLs) that keep readers hooked from the hook to the close.

• Funnel Architecture: Think beyond the page. You’ll help design the customer journey, identifying the psychological triggers needed to move a prospect through a multi-step funnel.

• Revenue Optimization: You aren’t just a writer; you’re a growth strategist. You will ideate and package offers, bumps, and upsells to maximize Conversion Rates and Average Order Value (AOV).

• Customer Empathy & Research: Get into the weeds of customer psychology. You should be comfortable (and eager) to jump on the phone with customers to uncover their true pain points, desires, and the "why" behind their purchase.



What You Bring to the Table

• Proven DR Track Record: You have a portfolio of text-based sales letters and funnel copy that actually generated revenue.

• Strategic Mindset: You understand how to bundle products and create "irresistible offers" that make it a no-brainer for the customer to buy.

• Versatility: You can pivot your tone from "food as medicine" health solutions to personal development or performance courses (e.g., breathwork) without losing efficacy.

• Analytical Curiosity: You don’t just write and forget; you look at the data, see where people are dropping off, and suggest pivots.

• Ad Experience (Bonus): If you can write the
/Instagram/YouTube ads that feed the funnel, you’ll be a top-tier candidate.



Key Responsibilities

• Writing long-form sales pages, landing pages, and
 sequences.

• Designing and testing upsell/downsell flows to boost AOV.

• Conducting deep-dive market research and customer interviews.

• Collaborating with the media buying team to ensure copy alignment from ad to offer.



Salary: Competitive / Negotiable



Why Join Us?



We value high-level thinkers who take ownership. You won't be micromanaged on your word choice; you will be measured on your results. If you are a student of human psychology and love the thrill of a winning campaign, we want to hear from you.



How to Apply: Please submit your application at zurl.to/Dkw7?source=CareerSite and include your portfolio or links to 2–3 live funnels you have written. In your cover letter, tell us about an offer or upsell you created that significantly moved the needle on AOV.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Senior Sales & Customer Service Representative (Inbound & Outbound Calls)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing Australian building inspection company specialising in pre-purchase building and pest inspections. We work with property buyers who need urgent, high-quality inspections, and we pride ourselves on delivering a professional, reliable service.



We are looking for a highly experienced sales professional to manage all incoming enquiries, follow up leads, and convert enquiries into confirmed bookings.

-----



ROLE OVERVIEW:

This is NOT a basic VA role.



You will be responsible for:



 - answering all inbound calls from customers

 - calling back missed enquiries immediately

 - following up quotes and converting leads into bookings

 - handling customer questions with confidence

 - closing sales over the phone



You must be confident, fast, and able to guide customers to make a decision.

-----



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Answer all inbound calls professionally and promptly

 - Call all new enquiries within minutes

 - Follow up all outstanding quotes and leads

 - Convert enquiries into confirmed bookings

 - Maintain a high booking/conversion rate

 - Communicate clearly and confidently with Australian customers

 - Use CRM (ServiceM8 or similar) to manage jobs and notes

 - Ensure no lead is missed or forgotten

-----

REQUIREMENTS (MUST HAVE)

 - Minimum 3+ years experience in phone-based sales or call centre sales

 - Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, easy to understand)

 - Strong sales ability (not just customer service)

 - Experience handling inbound and outbound calls

 - Ability to handle objections and close sales

 - Fast response time and high attention to detail

 - Comfortable working Australian business hours (9am–5pm AEST)

 - Stable internet connection and quiet working environment

-----



HIGHLY REGARDED (BONUS)

 - Experience working with Australian clients

 - Experience in service-based businesses

 - Experience using CRM systems (ServiceM8, HubSpot, etc.)

 - Previous real estate / construction industry exposure

-----



KPIs (PERFORMANCE MEASURED BY)

 -  Lead response time (must be immediate)

 - Call answer rate (90%+)

 - Lead-to-booking conversion rate

 - Follow-up completion rate

 - Customer satisfaction

-----



COMPENSATION

 - Full-time position (40 hours/week)

 - Competitive salary (based on experience)

 - Performance bonuses available based on results

-----



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, you MUST:

 - Submit a short voice recording introducing yourself

 - Describe your previous sales experience

 - Explain how you handle a customer who says “I need to think about it”

 - Include the word “INSPECTION” at the top of your application



Applications without these will NOT be considered.

-----



WHY JOIN US?

 - Long-term, stable role

 - Work with an Australian company

 - Opportunity to grow as the business scales

 - Performance-based rewards

-----



We are looking for someone who is driven, reliable, and results-focused.



If you are confident on the phone and know how to close sales, we want to hear from you.

title: Remote Quantity Surveyor / Construction Estimator
description:
ABOUT US

Eagle Eye Estimations is a new Australian professional construction estimating business and we are excited to be growing. We provide detailed quantity take-offs and cost estimates for concrete and earthworks projects across residential, commercial, and civil sectors.

We are building our remote team now — which means you would be getting in at the ground floor with a business that is actively expanding. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not just fill a role.



THE ROLE

You will be preparing detailed estimates and quantity take-offs for concrete and earthworks projects. The role starts project-based with a clear pathway to a fixed ongoing arrangement as project volume grows.



RESPONSIBILITIES

– Perform quantity take-offs for concrete & earthworks

– Complete coloured measurement markups & legends in Bluebeam

– Create cut & fill heat maps using earthworks software (Kubla or similar)

– Prepare Bills of Quantities (BOQs) and pricing summaries

– Work with Australian engineering and architectural drawings

– Deliver accurate estimates within agreed deadlines



REQUIREMENTS

– Degree in Quantity Surveying, Civil Engineering, or similar (preferred)

– Minimum 3 years experience as a QS or Estimator in commercial or civil construction

– Strong skills in Bluebeam Revu

– Advanced Excel — formulas, structured take-off sheets

– Experience with earthworks software (Kubla, Mudshark, 12d, Civil 3D or similar)

– Ability to read and interpret engineering & architectural drawings

– Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines

– Honest, proactive, and detail-oriented



PAY & GROWTH OPPORTUNITY

Eagle Eye Estimations is a new business and proud of it. Because we are in our early growth stage, this role currently pays per project based on complexity — meaning you are paid for every estimate you complete, with no lock-in on either side.

As project volume increases, we intend to move the right person into a fixed ongoing arrangement. If you want to be part of building something from the ground up and be rewarded for it as it grows, this is the role for you.



HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY

Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs. To apply, visit our skills assessment page:


/careers

Complete the online skills assessment in full. Only applicants who complete the assessment will be considered. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a live screen-share interview.

title: Client Services Manager – Australian Mortgages
description:
The Virtual Mortgage Professional / Client Services Manager provides end-to-end administrative, coordination,

and client-facing support to Australian mortgage brokers and loan writers. This role is critical to keeping loan

files moving, clients informed, and pipelines visible. The ideal candidate operates with minimal supervision, is

highly detail-oriented, and understands the Australian mortgage file lifecycle from application through to

settlement and beyond.



This role is particularly suited to brokers scaling their business who need a trusted, reliable VP to manage the

volume of client touchpoints, file administration, and post-settlement retention activity — freeing the broker to

focus on advising and writing loans.

Key Responsibilities



MIR Management & Follow-Up

• Track loan files across all stages and identify missing requirements (MIRs) early

• Send MIR requests to clients, lenders, and relevant third parties in a timely manner

• Follow up on all outstanding items via
 and phone, escalating where urgency requires

• Maintain clean, accurate file notes and clear audit trails across all client interactions

• Update CRM and broker software with all MIR communications and outcomes



Client File Administration & Data Entry

• Create and maintain client records and loan files across your CRM and document systems

• Complete accurate data entry across broker platforms, templates, and compliance checklists

• Upload, label, and organise all client and lender documents to agreed file standards

• Maintain stage-by-stage checklists to keep files progressing without delay

• Prepare loan application packs and supporting documents for submission



Liaison & Coordination with Support Staff and Third Parties

• Coordinate with the broker support team on file status, priorities, and next actions

• Liaise with lenders, valuers, conveyancers, and accountants as required during the loan process

• Escalate urgent issues early with clear context to the principal broker

• Schedule and confirm client appointments, callbacks, and broker reviews

• Act as a professional point of contact for clients during the processing phase



Clawback & Retention Support

• Track retention risk triggers, fixed-rate expiries, and upcoming review milestones

• Support retention workflows including proactive client outreach and documentation

• Assist with scheduled client touchpoints aligned to the broker's retention process

• Log all retention activity and flag at-risk clients for broker attention

• Coordinate annual or biannual loan reviews on behalf of the broker



Upsell & Referral Support

• Identify upsell opportunities (e.g. insurance, refinance, investment lending) within agreed guidelines

• Prepare draft outreach messages or campaign content for broker approval before sending

• Track outcomes of upsell activity and update the CRM for pipeline visibility

• Assist in nurturing the referral partner network with timely updates and acknowledgements



Reporting & Pipeline Visibility

• Deliver a daily or weekly pipeline snapshot covering all active loans and their current stage

• Track MIR volumes sent, outstanding, and resolved across the pipeline

• Prepare settlement reports, volume summaries, and conversion data as required

• Flag bottlenecks, delays, and workflow inefficiencies and suggest improvements

• Maintain visibility of upcoming settlements, fixed rate expiries, and review dates



Compliance & Document Management

• Ensure all client files meet compliance standards and are audit-ready at all stages

• Manage Privacy Act obligations in relation to client data handling and document storage

• Assist with preparation of loan documents and credit proposals as directed by the broker

• Maintain version-controlled templates and compliance checklists in line with current requirements



How to Apply



Please complete your application using the link below:



Apply here:





Choose "Mortgage Client Support Specialist (Remote)" for the  "Role Applying for"

Please make sure your application is complete and includes your relevant experience, software knowledge, and any background in executive support or property-related work.

title: Senior Accountant (Australian Tax and Business Services)
description:
About the job - Senior Accountant | Australian firm | Part-time | Flexible hours



About Create Financial

Create Financial is a modern Australian tax and advisory firm founded in 2025, built for Australia’s innovation ecosystem.



We work with founders and high-growth businesses across their entire journey — from idea ? growth ? scale ? exit.



Our services span:

- Tax and compliance

- ASIC and company secretarial

- R&D Tax Incentive

- CFO and commercial advisory



The Opportunity

This is a newly created role to support our growing client base. You’ll work directly with the Managing Partner and get exposure well beyond a traditional accounting firm role.



This role is ideal for a newly qualified CA or CPA coming out of an Australian business services or tax environment who wants something more flexible, commercial, and interesting.



It’s particularly well suited to someone returning to the workforce (e.g. a parent) who still wants to do high-quality work — without the rigid structure of a traditional firm.



You’ll get exposure to startups, founders, and real commercial decision-making — not just compliance work.



What You’ll Be Doing

You’ll support both client delivery and internal operations across the firm, including:



Client Accounting & Compliance

- Month-end support and financial reporting for clients

- Bank, payroll, and balance sheet reconciliations (Xero)

- Preparation of BAS, IAS, and income tax returns

- Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT) returns



Advisory & Operations Support

- Assist with entity setup and structuring

- Prepare ASIC forms and support ongoing compliance

- Support CFO/advisory engagements (cash flow, reporting, insights)



Growth & Learning

- Work with startups and scale-ups across different industries

- Exposure to grants, funding, and investor readiness



What We’re Looking For

- CA or CPA qualified (or very close to completion)

- 3–6 years’ experience in Australian business services / tax

- Strong working knowledge of Xero (non-negotiable)

- Experience preparing BAS, tax returns, and reconciliations

- Comfortable working directly with clients



How You Work

- Detail-oriented but pragmatic

- Comfortable in a fast-moving, less structured environment

- Proactive and able to manage your own time

- Enjoy working closely with founders and small teams

- Curious — you want to learn beyond compliance



Why Join Create Financial

- Flexibility first — part-time hours that fit around your life

- Remote-friendly — work from anywhere

- High-impact work — direct exposure to founders and decision-making

- Variety — no two clients or days are the same

- Growth — learn CFO, advisory, and R&D (not just tax)

- Small practice — no bureaucracy, real ownership
