 • Set priorities, manage people, and drive results



What this role is (and isn’t)

 • You start as the executor, but you won’t stay there

 • You are expected to grow into a team lead quickly

 • You won’t inherit a team. You’ll build it

 • This is not a “wait for instructions” role

 • If you only want to execute and not lead a team, this role is not a fit



It’s closer to: “build the marketing function, then lead it”



Who we’re looking for

 • You’ve worked across multiple marketing channels and know how they connect

 • You’re comfortable being hands-on now, but your goal is to lead and scale a team

 • You’ve managed people before, or you’re clearly ready to step into that role

 • You have good judgment on when to hire, what to outsource, and what to keep in-house

 • You care about outcomes and can prioritize what actually moves revenue

 • You’re proactive and don’t wait for perfect direction to get started



Compensation & growth



This role is designed to grow quickly.



You’ll start as a hands-on operator, but as you take on more responsibility, including hiring and leading a team, your compensation will grow accordingly. The expectation is that this evolves into an operator + team lead role in the near future, not years down the line.



Apply



Send your application by
 to 
 using keyword GrowthOperator0426 as the subject line.
salary: $10 to $14 per hour based on experience

title: VA for Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Property Manager
description:
The Virtual Airbnb / Short-Term Rental (STR) Property Manager is responsible for the end-to-end remote

management of one or more short-term rental properties listed on platforms including Airbnb, Stayz,, VRBO,

and 
 for Australian-based property owners. This role demands exceptional communication skills,

strong attention to detail, and the ability to work autonomously across Australian business hours.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Guest Communication & Experience

• Manage all guest enquiries, booking requests, and messages across Airbnb and other OTA platforms

• Respond to guests promptly (target: within 1 hour during business hours)

• Send pre-arrival, check-in, mid-stay, and post-stay automated and personalized messages

• Handle guest complaints, special requests, and escalations professionally

• Facilitate 5-star review generation through excellent guest relations

Listings Management

• Create, update, and optimize property listings (titles, descriptions, photos, amenities)

• Conduct keyword research and apply SEO best practices for OTA platforms

• Monitor competitor listings and suggest pricing or content improvements

• Manage multi-platform listings using channel managers (e.g. Hostaway, Guesty, Lodgify, OwnerRez)

Reservations & Calendar Management

• Manage availability calendars across all platforms to prevent double bookings

• Process reservations, modifications, and cancellations in accordance with platform policies

• Coordinate minimum stays, gap-fill strategies, and seasonal availability blocks

• Liaise with property owners on blackout dates and owner stays

Dynamic Pricing & Revenue Optimisation

• Manage and update pricing using dynamic pricing tools (e.g. PriceLabs, Beyond, Wheelhouse)

• Monitor occupancy rates, ADR (Average Daily Rate), and RevPAR

Confidential – For Recruitment Purposes Only

POSITION SCOPE & JOB DESCRIPTION | VIRTUAL PROFESSIONAL – AU MARKET

• Adjust rates based on demand, local events, school holidays, and seasonal trends in Australian markets

• Produce weekly/monthly performance reports for property owners

Operations & Housekeeping Coordination

• Schedule and coordinate cleaning teams between guest check-outs and check-ins

• Manage and track linen, supplies, and inventory restocking

• Conduct virtual property inspections using photos and video provided by cleaners or maintenance staff

• Coordinate routine and urgent maintenance with local tradespeople and property owners

• Maintain and update Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for the property

6. Compliance & Administration

• Ensure listings comply with Australian short-term rental regulations (e.g. NSW STRA register, QLD

requirements, council rules)

• Assist with lodging registration and documentation as required

• Manage guest ID verification and property access (lockboxes, smart locks)

• Maintain accurate records of bookings, income, expenses, and contractor invoices

• Assist with owner statements and basic reconciliation (Xero/MYOB familiarity a plus)

Owner & Stakeholder Reporting

• Provide regular performance updates and occupancy summaries to property owners

• Escalate property issues, guest disputes, or platform account concerns promptly

• Build strong, trusted relationships with AU-based property owners



How to Apply



Please complete your application using the link below:



Apply here:





Choose "Executive Assistant Support Specialist Canva + Social Media + Systems" for the "Role Applying for"

Please make sure your application is complete and includes your relevant experience, software knowledge, and any background in executive support or property-related work.

title: Hiring Senior Dispute/Chargeback Manager (Fashion Dropshipping) – Own Risk + Recovery at Scales
description:
We run multiple fast-growing e-commerce fashion stores in the US market, powered primarily by Google Ads. We generated multiple 7 figures in revenue in 2025, and we are building a long-term operation with strong systems, high customer satisfaction, and clean processing metrics.



Disputes and chargebacks are a core lever in our business. They impact profitability, payment approvals, and our ability to scale. We are looking for a Senior Dispute/Chargeback Manager who can take full ownership of dispute operations and build a prevention system that keeps our chargeback rate low as volume grows.



Role Overview



You will own the dispute and chargeback function end-to-end across our stores. Your job is to reduce disputes, win more cases, and prevent chargebacks by improving processes across support, shipping communication, and documentation.



This is not a basic CS role. We want an operator who knows how to manage dispute pipelines, evidence packs, deadlines, win-rate optimization, and root-cause fixes.



What You’ll Do:



Take full ownership of disputes/chargebacks across all stores and processors (Mainly Shopify Payments but future PayPal, etc.)

Monitor daily chargebacks/dispute queues, deadlines, outcomes, and processing risk metrics

D
 what to fight vs refund vs settle early (based on reason codes, evidence strength, and cost/risk)

Build strong, consistent evidence packs (tracking proof, customer comms, policies, product page proof, fraud indicators)



Improve dispute win rate by creating templates, checklists, and SOPs for each dispute type

Implement chargeback prevention systems:

reduce “item not received” disputes with tracking and proactive comms

reduce “not as described” disputes by improving product expectations, sizing clarity, PDP claims

reduce “fraud” disputes with risk filtering rules and order verification triggers



Work closely with Customer Support and Fulfillment to fix the root causes (shipping delays, missing tracking, unclear policies, weak documentation)



Maintain a clean internal “chargeback knowledge base” (reason code playbooks, best evidence by processor, common pitfalls)



Deliver weekly reporting:

dispute rate, chargeback rate, win rate, fee totals, refunds, top drivers

top disputed products/angles, what changed, what needs action next



Requirements (Must Have)

• Proven experience managing disputes/chargebacks for high-volume e-commerce fashion dropshipping stores

• Strong understanding of dispute reason codes (Fraud, INR, Not as Described, Cancelled/Returned, etc.)

• Experience with Shopify Payments/Stripe and PayPal disputes (and how evidence differs)

• Excellent written English and professional documentation skills

• Highly organized: can manage deadlines, queues, evidence archives, and reporting

• Can operate independently and improve systems without being micromanaged



Nice to Have

• Experience in fashion/apparel dropshipping

• Experience supporting Google Ads stores (high intent, higher volume swings)

• Familiarity with chargeback tools/platforms (Chargeflow, Midigator, Disputifier, etc.)

• Experience creating risk rules for fraud prevention and order screening

• Experience building workflows/macros that reduce disputes in helpdesks like Gorgias/Commslayer



Why Join Us

• Real ownership and decision-making power in a critical function

• High growth environment with long-term vision and serious execution

• Opportunity to build a real system and grow into broader Risk/Ops leadership

• We treat the team with respect and reward strong performance, + we're fun and love working together!



To Apply (Important)

1. Send your resume + a short summary of your dispute/chargeback experience (monthly volume, win rate, platforms used).

2. Include the word "WINNER" at the start of your message so we can filter applicants quickly.

3. (Optional but preferred) Share a brief outline of what you would do in your first 14 days to reduce disputes in a Google Ads fashion dropshipping store.



Excited to hear from you. Thank you.

title: Virtual Assistant — Android App QA & Monitoring (Long-term) (No Experience Needed)
description:
Looking for 500+ Android users to help test and monitor a background Android app across different phone and tablet brands/models.



Already applied to this Android tester role before? Please don’t re-apply — we’ll contact you if you’re a fit.



This is very simple: install the app from the Google Play Store, keep it running, and follow short testing/verification steps when requested.



What you do (simple):

- Install the app (Google Play Store)

- Keep it running in the background

- Phone stays connected to the internet (20-24h/day)

- Occasionally complete short check-in/testing steps (to confirm stability + uptime)



Why it’s a good fit:

- No calls, no meetings

- Works alongside any VA/freelance job

- Setup once ? keep running long-term

- Great for anyone who wants a low-effort side gig



Requirements:

- Android device (phone or tablet)

- Stable internet

- Phone online most of the day (target: 20–24h/day uptime)

- Reliable/consistent (uptime matters)



? Please do NOT apply if:

- Your phone is only online a few hours/day

- You use airplane mode at night / regularly disconnect

- You only use iPhone/iPad



? If you can keep your phone online 20–24h/day consistently, you’ll do well here.



How to apply:

One application per person. If you’ve applied before, no need to submit again.





Fill out this short form (takes 2 minutes):

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeEZwrQ5fN6QeelzTM5OGsiJ26ALtXwZZKX1HFPc0HtQwkxvw/viewform?usp=header



If you qualify, I’ll send setup instructions and your access code.

title: AI content editor
description:
We're looking for a sharp, detail-oriented editor to join our content team. This is a remote, freelance role that combines editorial judgement with a fast, AI-assisted workflow. You'll be responsible for generating, editing, and quality-checking articles using our in-house AI content tool, and over time, helping us train and manage a wider team of editors doing the same.



What you'll be doing

- Using our AI content generation tool to produce articles quickly and efficiently

- Editing and refining AI-generated drafts for tone, accuracy, relevancy, and readability

- Finding the best angle for each piece and making sure it delivers genuine value to the reader

- Checking all links are working and pointing to the right places

- Fact-checking claims, particularly on more technical or sensitive topics

- Taking ownership of the quality and relevancy of every article you produce

- Once settled in, helping to hire, onboard, and train additional editors to work within the same workflow



What we're looking for

- C1 level English or above (written fluency is essential)

- A good editorial eye: you know what makes a piece work and what doesn't

- Experience as a writer or editor is a strong advantage

- Comfortable working with digital tools and picking up new workflows quickly

- Reliable, self-directed, and able to maintain quality at pace

- An interest in moving into a team lead or training role



The workflow

We use an AI content generation tool that handles the initial draft. Your job is to take that draft and turn it into a polished, publish-ready article. 



Pay

Payment is per project, and the average rate will be £5 per hour. Volume is consistent, so there's real earning potential for editors who work efficiently.



How to apply

To apply, please start your cover letter with 'Hey Valme!' and include a link to your favourite YouTube video and a sentence or two on why it's your favourite. Also include some recent writing or editing examples and a brief summary of your experience.

title: Instagram DM Outbound Assistant
description:
Instagram DM Outbound Assistant — Close Pro Academy



About Us



Close Pro Academy is a UK-based sales mentorship programme that helps people break into remote high-ticket closing. We've helped hundreds of people leave corporate jobs, learn high-level sales skills, and build careers as remote sales professionals — many earning £10-20K+ per month. The business is growing fast and we need support managing our Instagram DM pipeline.



About the Role



We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle outbound Instagram DM outreach and follow-ups. This is NOT a sales role — you will not be qualifying leads, pitching, or booking calls. Your job is simple: start conversations with the right people using pre-written scripts, follow up when they don't reply, and log everything.



Specifically you'll be:



— Sending outbound DMs to new followers, people who like our posts, and people who view our stories (using scripts we provide)

— Following up on previous messages that haven't received a reply (maximum 2 follow-ups per person)

— Sending call reminders to people who have booked calls with our team

— Logging every conversation in a Google Sheet tracker

— Checking profiles before messaging to make sure they're a good fit



When someone replies to your message, our AI system picks up the conversation from there. You don't need to handle any back-and-forth qualification — just open the door.



What We're Looking For



— Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and hit your targets.

— Attention to detail. You follow the scripts accurately and log everything properly.

— Good written English. Messages need to sound natural, not robotic.

— Comfortable using Instagram on desktop or mobile.

— Experience with Google Sheets.

— Previous experience in DM outreach, lead generation, or virtual assistant roles is a plus but not essential — we'll train you.



Hours and Pay



— 4 hours per day, Monday to Friday

— Flexible on which hours as long as the daily tasks are completed

— $4-5/hour USD depending on experience

— Paid weekly or fortnightly (your preference)



How to Apply



Send me a short message about yourself — what experience you have, why this role interests you, and your availability. If you've done Instagram outreach or DM work before, mention that specifically.

title: Audit Senior
Intermediate / Senior Auditor
description:
At AMW Audit Group, we focus solely on external audit—and we do it exceptionally well. As one of Australia’s trusted independent audit firms, we support schools, charities, private businesses, and SMSFs across the country.

We’re now looking for experienced SMSF auditors to join our growing offshore team. This is a long-term, fully remote opportunity where your expertise is valued, your time is respected, and your work-life balance is protected.



You’ll work closely with our in-house team to audit SMSFs for Australian clients, following ATO standards from planning through to reporting. The role offers competitive pay, a flexible work setup, a realistic workload, and a team culture built on trust and clear communication.



We’re looking for auditors with proven SMSF experience and a solid grasp of Australian audit standards. CA, CPA, or equivalent qualifications are welcome, but what matters most is your attention to detail, professional mindset, and ability to deliver quality work independently.

If you’re looking for a stable role with a supportive team, we’d love to hear from you.



SMSF Intermediate/Senior Auditor Qualifications:



• At least 2 years audit experience including experience in SMSF audit and/or SMSF administration

• Prior Big 4 audit experience is a plus

• Knowledge of Australian Auditing Standards

• Knowledge of the SIS Act and Regulations

• Experience in SMSF accounting software e.g. Class, BGL is a plus

Additional requirements:

• High attention to detail

• Ability to work independently and with teams

• A positive attitude and willingness to learn



Job Description:

• Auditing SMSF Financial Statements and SIS compliance

• Working on a daily basis with audit manager/s

• Gaining knowledge of Superannuation laws and updates



Kindly
 your updated CV:  
 



We Look forward to hearing from you.

title: Content & Production Coordinator (Live Shows & Podcast | Remote)
description:
Content & Production Coordinator (Live Shows & Podcast)

Full-time | Remote | CST hours



Take note: This is a FULL-TIME role, so if you're looking for an additional work on top of your current employment, this might not be the best fit for you.



We’re looking for a highly organized Content & Production Coordinator to manage guest coordination, show preparation, and backend execution across multiple weekly live shows and a podcast.



What You’ll Do

• Coordinate guest booking, scheduling, and onboarding

• Manage production calendars for 5 weekly live shows + 1 podcast

• Prepare show assets (scripts, slides, graphics coordination)

• Set up and manage live broadcasts (e.g. Streamyard)

• Support live shows (timing, transitions, backend execution)

• Organize files, workflows, and recurring processes

• Coordinate post-production and content publishing



?



What We’re Looking For

• 2+ years experience in coordination, production, or project management roles

• Experience supporting podcasts, live shows, or content production workflows is required

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Comfortable managing multiple recurring deadlines

• Clear and professional English communication

• Familiar with tools like Google Drive, Calendly, ClickUp, or similar

• Experience with Streamyard or similar tools is a strong advantage



Please answer the screening questions below along with your updated resume. 

1. Have you supported live shows, podcasts, or similar productions before? Please describe your exact role and responsibilities.

2. This role involves managing 5 weekly live shows and 1 podcast. How would you organize and track all tasks to ensure nothing is missed each week?

3. Which tools have you used for live show or content production (e.g., Streamyard, Zoom, OBS, etc.)? Briefly describe how you used them.

4. You’re about to go live in 2 minutes. A guest hasn’t joined, and the slides are incomplete. What would you do?

5. How do you ensure accuracy and consistency when handling repetitive weekly tasks like show prep and scheduling?

title: Technical Support Specialist (FRESH GRADUATES)
description:
***WE WILL ONLY ACCEPT FRESH GRADUATES WITH A DEGREE IN IT OR COMPUTER SCIENCE, AND WHO ARE PROFICIENT WITH HTML, CSS, AND JAVASCRIPT OR OTHER WEB DEVELOPMENT LANGUAGES.***



***PRODUCT TRAINING WILL BE PROVIDED***





About the Position

We are currently hiring a Technical Support Specialist who is enthusiastic, reliable, and eager to learn.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving problems, working with technology, and assisting customers in a meaningful way.



Instead of simply responding with templated answers, you will take time to understand each customer’s business, their goals, and the challenges they are facing. The goal is to provide thoughtful, clear, and helpful solutions that truly support their needs.



We are looking for someone who is professional, curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-moving startup environment.





Key Responsibilities

• Provide timely responses to customer questions with clear and friendly communication

• Investigate and resolve technical or support-related issues

• Create and manage support tickets in Jira and coordinate with internal teams when escalation is required

• Review customer history and understand their business needs before providing solutions

• Deliver personalized and thoughtful assistance rather than relying on scripted replies





Qualifications

• Fresh graduates with a degree in IT or Computer Science – Required

• Proficient with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, or other web development languages – Required

• Excellent English communication skills (both written and spoken) – Required

• Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability

• High level of attention to detail

• Ability to adapt conversations naturally instead of using scripts

• Positive attitude and willingness to learn new tools and technologies

• Customer-focused mindset with curiosity 



Nice to Have (but not required):

• Previous experience in customer support, particularly in tech environments

• Hands-on Shopify experience

• Experience using CRM/ticketing systems



Work Setup

• Remote / Work-from-home position

• 8 hours per day

• 5 working days per week (option to work 6 days if preferred)

• Full-time role





TO BE CONSIDERED, PLEASE FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY:



• USE “TECHNICAL” AS THE SUBJECT LINE WHEN SUBMITTING YOUR APPLICATION

• ATTACH YOUR UPDATED CV/RESUME

• INCLUDE A SHORT COVER LETTER INTRODUCING YOURSELF



IMPORTANT: APPLICATIONS SUBMITTED WITHOUT A RESUME WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.

Full-time, remote work. Immediate start. 1-2 people needed for growing team.

We are an established hardware company looking for Customer Service Representatives to support the growth of our international business. Primary responsibilities include attending to customer queries over

A successful candidate will be passionate about delivering an enjoyable customer experience, have excellent English written communication skills, very high attention to detail, and the ability to work in an organised manner.

mbers to follow up.

- Please respond to this job application with 'REF:
in your title so we know that you've read it thoroughly (make sure the reference is in the title itself, not just in the message content).



Experience & Skills

- Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

mbers.

mbers who have graduated to working independently automatically qualify for a monthly bonus (usually takes about 3-6 months to reach this level)

mbers able to work independently can be offered flexible working hours or part-time work opportunities.

mber and training roles.

title: Expense Reporting Coordinator (Virtual Assistant) – Finance Support
description:
20–40 hours per week - flexible for good candidate

Long-term role



About This Role



We are hiring someone to take full ownership of credit card expense reporting for our team.



Every month, tea
mbers make purchases. Your job is to make sure:



Every expense has a receipt

Every transaction is categorized correctly

That its code to the correct, deparment, location, and general ledger account

Nothing is missing, late, or unclear



This role is simple in concept—but requires high attention to detail and consistent follow-through.



A large part of this job is following up with people who forget, delay, or avoid submitting receipts. You need to be comfortable doing this regularly, in a clear and professional way.



If you are not comfortable reminding people multiple times, this role will be frustrating.



What You’ll Do

Review credit card transactions and match them with receipts

Follow up with tea
mbers for missing or incomplete items

Keep a clear record of what is submitted and what is still outstanding

Categorize expenses correctly in spreadsheets or accounting tools

Flag anything that looks incorrect, duplicated, or unusual

Keep all files organized so they are easy to review later



What Matters in This Role

You notice missing details without being told

You follow up until things are complete (not just once)

You keep things organized so nothing gets lost

You communicate clearly and directly

You handle financial information responsibly



This Role Is a Good Fit If You:

Like working with structure and checklists

Pay attention to small details others miss

Are comfortable following up with people consistently

Prefer clear, repeatable work over constantly changing tasks



This Role Is NOT a Good Fit If You:

Dislike repetitive work

Avoid following up with people

Need constant direction to stay on track

Rush through tasks and miss details

Tools You May Use

Google Sheets / Excel

 and messaging tools (Slack or similar)

Basic accounting or expense tools



(You do not need to know all tools in advance, but you must be comfortable learning.)



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



To apply, follow these steps:



Put the word “Stewardship” in your subject line

Answer this question:



If someone ignores your requests for receipts multiple times, what would you do?



Include:

Your relevant experience

Tools you’ve used

Your availability and expected hourly rate

Final Note



This role requires consistency, attention to detail, and steady follow-through.



If you do your job well:



Everything will be complete

Nothing will be missing

And the finance team won’t need to chase anything



That’s what success looks like.

title: Employer Branding & LinkedIn Consultant (Project-Based | Remote | Part-Time)
description:
BE SmartAdmin Services Pty Ltd (BESAS) is a growing professional services company providing bookkeeping, paraplanning, and administrative support to international clients. We also operate two additional entities: BE Wealth and Strategic Financial.



We are currently building a strong, consistent online presence across all three companies to improve our employer branding, recruitment visibility, and overall company identity.



We are looking for a Project-Based Employer Branding & LinkedIn Consultant to lead this initiative.



Role Overview



This is a short-term project (1–2 months) focused on building the foundation of our online employer brand—not ongoing social media management.



The goal is to improve how candidates perceive our companies online and strengthen our ability to attract high-quality talent.



Key Responsibilities

Optimize 
pany pages for BESAS, BE Wealth, and Strategic Financial

Develop clear Employer Value Proposition (EVP) and employer branding messaging

Create simple, recruitment-focused landing pages (one per entity)

Improve overall company positioning and online identity

Provide a basic structure for ongoing LinkedIn updates (quarterly maintenance approach)

Required Skills & Experience



We are looking for someone with proven experience in:




pany page optimization

Employer branding or recruitment marketing

Creating landing pages or simple web pages (Carrd, Notion, Canva, Webflow, etc.)

Writing clear, professional business messaging for talent attraction



Portfolio is required.



Applicants must show examples of:




pany pages they have improved

Employer branding or recruitment marketing work

Landing pages or similar projects

Work Arrangement

Part-time, project-based

Semi-flexible schedule

Must be available for collaboration during 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Philippine Time)

Output-focused role with agreed milestones

Payment Terms



This is a milestone-based project:



Milestone 1: LinkedIn audit + strategy + brand messaging direction

Milestone 2: Employer branding development + LinkedIn optimization

Milestone 3: Landing pages + final documentation + handover

Not Suitable For

Virtual assistants without branding experience

Social media content posters

Paid ads specialists only

Applicants without portfolio examples

Candidates seeking full-time employment

How to Apply



Please send:



CV

Portfolio of relevant work

Expected project fee

Short explanation of how you would improve a company’s online presence and employer branding

Bonus Question (Optional but preferred)



What would be your first priority in improving a company with a weak LinkedIn presence?

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Join the Team as a Senior  Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Creative Support Specialist (QA Focus)
description:
At Penji, we’re raising the bar for creative quality—and we need someone who can spot what others miss.

This is not your typical design role.

You won’t be creating designs—you’ll be analyzing, evaluating, and elevating them.

If you have a strong design background and enjoy breaking down why a design works (or doesn’t), this role puts you at the center of improving creative performance and client satisfaction.



What You’ll Own

Creative Quality Reviews

Evaluate completed designs—especially those with low ratings, revisions, or cancellations. Ensure alignment with client briefs, brand standards, and design fundamentals.

Root Cause Analysis

Go beyond surface-level feedback. Identify the real issues behind:

• Misinterpreted briefs 

• Weak execution 

• Brand inconsistencies 

• Communication gaps 



Pattern & Trend Tracking

Spot recurring issues across designers and project types. Your insights will drive smarter decisions and better outcomes.

Quality Reporting

Document findings and flag consistent concerns to Team Leaders and HR with clarity and objectivity.

Continuous Improvement

Help leadership:

• Reduce revision cycles 

• Improve training programs 

• Increase client satisfaction 



What Makes You a Strong Fit

• Design Expertise: Solid grasp of layout, typography, color theory, and branding 

• Analytical Thinking: You separate subjective taste from objective design flaws 

• QA / Art Direction Experience: You’ve reviewed creative work or enforced brand standards 

• Clear Communicator: You deliver structured, unbiased feedback 



Technical Requirements

• Reliable computer for reviewing design files 

• Stable internet connection 

• Webcam (720p or higher) 

• Headset or microphone 



Perks & Benefits

• Recognition programs & performance incentives 

• 100% remote work setup 

• Career growth & advancement opportunities 

• Paid maternity & paternity leave 

• Monthly competitions & creative challenges 

• Paid time off (with monthly accrual) 

• Wellness & mental health support 

• Ongoing training, mentorship & development 

• Long-term stability 



Bonus Points If You

• Have experience with project management tools (task history reviews) 

• Have worked in both Graphic Design and Customer Support/Success 

• Can create simple quality reports or trend analyses 



How to Apply (Read Carefully????)

We value attention to detail—this is your first test:

1 Complete the application form:



2 When asked “Please type the magic phrase,” enter:

qualitymatters 

3 Attach your portfolio and resume highlighting QA/review experience 

Applications without the correct magic phrase will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor
description:
We’re seeking a highly talented Video Editor with a strong eye for detail, pacing, and storytelling. This role focuses on creating engaging short-form content (20–30 seconds) for social media platforms while also editing longer-form videos as needed. You must be able to deliver work at a professional, high-quality standard.



Responsibilities:



Edit short-form content (20–30 sec) that is engaging, dynamic, and social media-ready.



Edit longer-form content or repurpose it for social platforms while maintaining quality.



Follow specific creative briefs and requests accurately.



Maintain brand consistency across all video content.



Collaborate closely with the marketing and creative teams to ensure videos meet objectives.



Provide polished edits with motion graphics, text overlays, color grading, and sound design where needed.



Manage multiple projects and deliver on deadlines without compromising quality.



Requirements:



Proven experience as a video editor producing high-quality social media content.



Exceptional skill with video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects or Davinci, etc.).



Strong sense of storytelling, pacing, and visual style.



Excellent command of English (written and spoken).



Ability to take direction and follow creative briefs precisely.



Strong attention to detail and quality.



Portfolio demonstrating both short-form and longer-form content edits.



Important:



Do not apply if you cannot edit at a professional, high-quality level.



We value creativity, efficiency, and a polished final product above all.

title: Senior NDIS HR (Remote | Full-Time)
description:

You’ll be working closely with leadership to ensure smooth HR operations, compliance, and team support.



When applying, please put one of the following in your
 subject line:

“EXPERIENCED – NDIS HR” – if you have hands-on experience in NDIS HR

“WILLING TO BE TRAINED – HR” – if you have HR experience but limited NDIS exposure



Please also send your CV. An introductory video is a bonus but not required.



In your application, briefly answer:

What is the nature of business of the NDIS provider you've worked with?



Key Responsibilities:

Manage end-to-end recruitment and onboarding for NDIS staff

Ensure NDIS compliance (Worker Screening, documentation, audits)

Maintain and update employee records and HR systems

Handle contracts, policies, and HR documentation

Support performance management and employee relations

Oversee onboarding/offboarding processes

Assist with HR reporting and process improvements



Candidate Requirements:

At least 1-2 years HR experience, preferably in the NDIS sector

Strong knowledge of NDIS compliance and onboarding requirements

Experience handling recruitment, onboarding, and HR admin

Excellent communication and organizational skills

High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks

Comfortable working remotely and independently



Nice-to-have:

Experience working with Australian clients or healthcare providers

Familiarity with HRIS, ATS, or CRM systems

Experience managing remote teams



Compensation & Benefits:

Permanent work from home

Day shift

HMO benefits

title: Administrative Coordinator
description:
Local Foreigner is a boutique consultancy specializing in high-end curated travel. From the bespoke to the basics, we guide our clients on everything from a weekend in Paris to an expedition to Patagonia. Our mission is to deliver highly personalized travel experiences through thoughtful service and a seamless planning process. 



We are seeking a detail-oriented and resourceful Administrative Coordinator to support day-to-day operations. This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.  



This is a unique opportunity to join a small, collaborative team in a supportive but demanding work environment. 



COMPENSATION 



Training period (4–6 months): $5/hour + monthly internet allowance 

Post-training: $6/hour + monthly internet allowance 



WORK SCHEDULE 



Full-time (40 hours per week) 

Typical schedule: 9 PM – 5 AM Philippine local time (aligned with EU/US hours) 

Flexibility to support US weekend hours is a plus 



RESPONSIBILITIES 



All Administrative tea
mbers are cross-trained and support a range of operational and travel support-related tasks, including: 

Responding to Help Desk tickets for internal and affiliate teams 

Managing shared inbox and phone inquiries 

Scheduling supplier meetings  

Supporting recruitment lifecycle including corresponding with candidates and arranging interviews 

Updating internal Salesforce database (contacts, suppliers, and other related materials) 

Supporting the A/R collection processes 

Creating and updating client travel documents (itineraries, rate checks) 

Drafting and updating SOPs and other internal documentation 

Providing administrative support to partners and senior leadership 

Assisting with ad-hoc projects as needed 



REQUIREMENTS 



Proficient in Microsoft Office; Confluence, Jira, Salesforce and QuickBooks experience is a plus 

Experience in an administrative, virtual assistant, or similar support role 

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills 

Proactive, resourceful, and able to problem-solve independently 

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines 

Strong written and verbal communication skills 

Team player with the ability to work independently 

Previous experience in a travel support or travel operations role is a plus 

Experience with Sabre or other GDS systems is a plus

title: Organic Marketing Expert / Community Manager
description:
# Community Manager/Marketing Expert — Crypto & Manga Startup (Remote, Long-Term)



**Hours**:
hours/week, flexible schedule with some overlap needed for real-time engagement



**Contract**: Week-by-week, ongoing. Either side may end with a 2-week notice period. The goal is long-term (6+ months, ideally years), but you're not locked in.



**Start date**: Immediate



**Rate**: Set your own hourly rate when you apply — tell me what works for you.



---



## About the role



I'm a solo founder building a new startup in the crypto prediction market space, launching in 8 weeks. I'm looking for ONE community manager to grow my social media presence and community from zero, starting now, and continuing long-term once we launch.



This is a focused, long-term position. I'm not hiring for a one-off project — I'm looking for someone who wants to grow into the primary community voice for a real startup. The right person will be part of this from pre-launch through scale.



**I cannot do this role alone while building the product. Your work directly determines whether we launch to a warm community or to an empty room.**



---



## What you'll actually do (day to day)



Your job has five main pillars. You don't need to be an expert at all five — but the more of these you already have real experience with, the stronger your application.



**1. Reddit community engagement**



You will maintain a presence in manga-specific subreddits (around 5-6 specific communities I'll tell you about). You'll:

- Monitor daily discussion threads and prediction threads

- Make thoughtful, value-add comments that build account karma

- Answer questions about prediction markets in relevant crypto/gambling subs

- Track the top predictors in each community for a future outreach list

- **NOT** spam or promote the product — this is relationship and reputation building



**2.
/X daily posting and engagement**



You will run the brand
 account with 2-3 posts daily plus replies:

- Post commentary, questions, and insights about weekly manga chapters

- Reply to 15-20 manga/crypto accounts daily to build visible engagement

- Track metrics weekly (followers, impressions, engagement rate)

- Look for potential gambling/manga affiliates 

- Use templates I provide for common post types — with freedom to adapt voice



**3. TikTok organic marketing**



You will run the brand TikTok account with a consistent organic posting cadence:

- Produce short-form video content around manga chapters, predictions, and community 
nts (using templates, trends, and formats I'll help develop)

- Participate in relevant manga/anime/crypto trends and sounds while they're hot

- Engage in comments on our posts and on larger manga/anime creators' videos to build visibility

- Track what's working (views, watch time, follows) and iterate weekly

- Film/edit simple content in CapCut or similar — polished studio production is not the goal, authentic fandom energy is



**4. 
 community management** ( This will be further in the future )



Once our 
 launches, you'll manage it day to day:

- Welcome new members

- Post daily discussion prompts

- Moderate spam and off-topic content

- Answer common questions using our FAQ (I'll build it)

- Escalate financial/technical questions to me



**5. Research and content support**



- Compile lists of top community members across platforms

- Draft blog posts and newsletter content from my outlines

- Create simple graphics in Canva from our templates

- Weekly metrics report



---



## What you'll NOT do



- Handle money, wallets, or financial accounts (you will never have access)

- Make strategic business decisions

- Speak on behalf of the founder for serious topics

- Write AI-generated content or use ChatGPT to write posts for you

- Post or comment without training and approval for the first month



---



## Who I'm looking for



**This role has ONE non-negotiable requirement: you must genuinely enjoy manga, manhwa, anime, or similar Asian comics/animation.**



This is not negotiable. The role involves daily engagement in manga communities. If you have to fake interest, those communities will smell it instantly and your posts will fall flat. The best candidate reads chapters weekly and has strong opinions about story arcs.



**Other requirements:**



- Fluent written English (your posts will be on English-language platforms read by native speakers)

- 2+ years of social media management experience, ideally for a brand or content creator

- Active personal presence on
/X and Reddit (I want to see you actually use these platforms)

- Reliable internet and professional work environment

- Willing to commit to long-term work (even though the contract is week-by-week, I want someone planning to stay)

- Available for a weekly 30-minute check-in call



**Strong advantages (will help you stand out):**



- You already read manga/manhwa/webtoons weekly

- **You have experience in the online gambling space** — affiliate marketing, casino community management, sportsbook social media, poker forums, prediction market communities, or any related work. This is highly valued. You understand how to engage gambling-adjacent communities without getting banned, how to build trust in an industry where trust is scarce, and how the culture actually talks. If you've worked for a casino, sportsbook, affiliate site, prediction market, or anything in that world — tell me about it.

- You have written long-form content (blog posts, newsletters, Reddit posts with 100+ upvotes)

- You understand basic crypto (what a wallet is, what USDC is) OR are willing to learn quickly

- **You can be paid in USDC (a crypto stablecoin) directly to a Solana wallet.** This is a strong preference for this role — it's cheaper, faster, and means I pay you within minutes instead of waiting days on Wise/Payoneer. If you don't already have a Solana wallet (Phantom, Solflare, etc.), I'm happy to help you set one up — it takes 10 minutes. Traditional payment methods (Wise, Payoneer, PayPal) are also fine, just less preferred.

- You've done community management or 
 moderation before

- You've lived in a fandom as an active participant (not just consumer)



**Not a fit:**



- Generalist VAs who list 20 different specialties

- Anyone who would rely on AI to write posts ( we encourage using it as a guideline and for assistance )

- "Social media managers" who only know how to schedule posts

- Anyone looking for a short-term gig



---



## Contract structure



This is a week-by-week ongoing contract, not a fixed-term agreement. Either of us can end the working relationship with a 2-week notice period. I do this for a few reasons:



- It's a startup, so I need flexibility in case the business direction changes

- You retain the freedom to leave if this isn't the right fit for you, without being locked in

- The 2-week notice ensures neither side is left scrambling



**What this means for you:**

- You get paid weekly or on a schedule we agree on

- If either side wants to end the contract, we give 2 weeks notice and you're paid for those 2 weeks

- No penalties, no drama, no lock-ins

- If things work well (which I fully intend for them to), this is an open-ended long-term role



I don't fire people casually. I want this to work for the long haul. The 2-week notice is a safety net, not an expectation.



---



## The hiring process



Because the role requires genuine manga knowledge and strong writing, I have a simple filter. Include these in your application:



**1. Name three manga, manhwa, or webtoons you currently read weekly (or most recently read).** Tell me what you love about them in 2-3 sentences each. Generic responses = instant rejection. I want to know what YOU think.



**2. Explain what a prediction market is in two sentences.** If you don't know, research it for 10 minutes and write it in your own words. Do not paste a definition.



**3. Write a sample 280-character
/X post announcing that a prediction market has launched where people can bet on the outcome of One Piece Chapter 1148.** Try to sound like a human, not an advertisement.



**4. Share links to your personal
/X and Reddit profiles.** I want to see how you actually communicate online.



**5. Tell me: what's one manga/manhwa/anime prediction you made in the last year that turned out to be right? What's one that was wrong?** This tells me you actually engage with the story, not just read it.



**6. Tell me your hourly rate and your expected hours per week.** Set your own number based on your experience. I'll evaluate value against rate — experienced candidates with strong portfolios can command higher rates.



**7. Tell me your preferred payment method.** USDC on Solana is strongly preferred (I pay you within minutes, zero fees). If you don't know what that means but are willing to learn, that's fine — I'll walk you through it. Otherwise, list whether you want Wise, Payoneer, or PayPal.



Applications missing any of these seven items will not be reviewed.



---



## Trial period



Top 2-3 applicants from the filter will be invited to a paid trial:



- **10 hours of work at your stated hourly rate**, completed within 5 days

- Specific tasks assigned (research, writing, strategic analysis)

- Tests your research quality, writing voice, and strategic thinking

- After the trial, I'll hire ONE person long-term



This is paid work — not a free audition. If you do the trial tasks well and I hire someone else, you still get paid for your 10 hours.



---



## Growth and compensation



I believe in paying for value and increasing pay as value grows. Expect:



- **30-day review**: First formal check-in on performance, fit, and scope

- **90-day review**: First rate increase if performance exceeds expectations

- **Ongoing**: Rate increases every 6-12 months based on performance and expanded responsibilities

- **Performance bonuses available**: For hitting specific community growth metrics

- **13th month bonus**: Philippines standard — I honor this

- **Public credit**: You'll appear in launch materials. Your work is visible, not hidden.



**My commitment to you:**

- You get paid on time, every single time, no exceptions

- You get clear feedback, not vague frustration

- Your wins get public credit

- You get to grow — your success = my success



---



## Tools I'll provide



- All social media account access (managed via password manager)

- Canva Pro account for graphics

- Training materials, voice guides, and content templates

- Direct access to me for questions



---



## What I expect from you



- **Daily check-ins** (5 minutes at start and end of shift)

- **Consistency** — this role requires daily work, not bursts

- **Ownership** — you treat this as your community, not just your job

- **Honesty** — if a post isn't working, tell me. If you're confused, ask.

- **Growth mindset** — you want to be doing this better in 3 months than you are today



---



## Why work with me



I'm a solo founder, bootstrapped, shipping fast. This is not a corporate role. You'll have:



- Direct relationship with the founder (me)

- Real input on product and community decisions

- Visibility into how a startup actually gets built

- Opportunity to grow into a senior role as we scale

- A long-term home if you're good at this



I won't pretend this is glamorous — it's 30 hours/week of consistent grinding on social platforms for months before we see real results. But if you love manga, you want to build something, and you want a stable role where you matter, this is the right fit.



---



## How to apply



Send your application with all seven items listed above in "The hiring process" section. Applications that don't include all seven items will not be reviewed.



I will respond to every complete application within 3 days.



Looking forward to meeting my future teammate.

title: Editor
description:
Role: Video Editor (YouTube documentary style: archival footage + light animation)

Start: Immediately



Important: We provide the script and voice-over. You focus 100% on editing + motion.



Job Description



You build a tight radio edit from our voice-over, source suitable Public Domain/CC footage, and add light animation (Ken Burns, parallax/2.5D, lower thirds, year titles, map pins). You ensure a solid audio mix and basic color correction, and deliver YouTube-ready exports plus well-organized project files.



Responsibilities



Radio edit and timing based on the provided VO (place markers/chapters).



Source and curate footage (Wikimedia, Library of Congress, NARA) with correct attribution.



Apply Ken Burns and light parallax; maintain consistent lower thirds / title cards / year slates.



Audio mix: high-pass, de-esser, compression, music ducking; limiter to ?1 dBTP (target ?14 LUFS).



Basic color correction for a uniform look.



Requirements



Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve (advanced level).



After Effects or Fusion for simple motion (lower thirds, 2.5D).



Strong sense of pacing for photo-driven edits (image change approx. every 3–5 seconds).



Experience with Public Domain/CC materials and proper crediting.



Clear communication in English is a plus.



Deliverables per video



1× MP4 (1080p or 4K)



contact us to receive a link from the competitor

title: Professional Video Editor
description:
We are a US-based creative agency producing employer brand video content for enterprise tech companies and other clients. Think polished short-form social content, interview edits, b-roll compilations, and branded storytelling. Our clients have high standards, and we deliver consistently.



**Do not apply if you use AI software to edit videos, we are creating actual content, not easy plug-and-play slop**



We are looking for a long-term video editor to join our small remote team. This is not a one-project gig. If the work is strong, you will have consistent hours every week, a reliable monthly income, and the opportunity to grow as we bring on new clients.



What you will be doing:

- Cutting short-form social videos (15 to 120 seconds) from long-form interview footage and b-roll

- Creating reels, clips, and branded social content for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

- Occasionally editing longer YouTube content

- Working from run-of-show documents and creative briefs we provide

- As you grow with us: additional formats including hospitality, travel, and commercial content



What we need from you:

- 4+ years editing video professionally, ideally for brands or agencies

- Strong instincts for short-form pacing, music selection, and caption placement

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Basic motion graphics and animation required. Strong motion graphics is a major bonus and will affect your rate.

- A portfolio or reel that shows storytelling ability, not just technical edits

- Available for overlap with Pacific Time (US) during the week

- This must be your primary job, not a side project

- Clear written and spoken English



What you can expect from us:

- Consistent weekly work with a stable monthly rate

- Direct communication with the creative director, no middleman

- Clear briefs and organized project files every time

- Room to grow: as we add clients, your hours and rate will grow with us

- Long-term relationship if the work is excellent



Rate: $1,000 to $1,500 per month depending on experience, portfolio quality, and motion graphics ability.



To apply: send your portfolio and 2 to 3 examples of short-form brand or social content you have edited.

title: Senior Bookkeeper Needed for IRS Audit Preparation (High Accuracy Required)

 • Vendor

?



This work will be used for IRS audit purposes, so accuracy is CRITICAL.



?

 • Strong bookkeeping experience (minimum 2+ years)

?

?

This could become a long-term role for the right person.

title: AI System Integrator - $6,000–$8,000 USD/Month
description:
Head of AI & Automation - $6,000–$8,000 USD/Month



Remote | Full-Time | Flexible Sched | 30 Paid Leaves

APPLICATION FORM: 

We will only process candidates who applied via google form



About Us



We are the Golden Horde, an e-commerce company with 2 brands generating $10M+ in yearly revenue in the pain relief space. We move fast, hold people accountable, and we're now building the AI infrastructure that will power the next phase of our growth.





The Role



We have no AI systems in place today - and that's exactly the opportunity. You'll come in as the first and only technical mind in the company, audit our entire operation, and build the automation and AI infrastructure from the ground up. You'll work directly with the CEO to identify inefficiencies, design solutions, and execute them. In 90 days, you will have mapped every friction point in the business, delivered a build roadmap, and have your first automations running in production.





What You'll Do



Systems Audit & Strategy



-Map our entire operation across Shopify, Klaviyo, Funnelish, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Slack, Asana, and Google Drive within the first 30 days

-Identify the top friction points costing us time and money

-Present a prioritised automation roadmap to the CEO with projected time and cost savings per build





AI & Automation Builds



-Build AI automations and agents using Claude, Claude Code, and relevant APIs

-Connect data across our stack — ad spend, revenue, inventory, customer data — into clean, reliable reporting dashboards

-Automate repetitive workflows currently done manually by the team

Replace manual processes with systems that run without human intervention





Ongoing Optimisation



-Own every automation you build — monitor, fix, improve

-Document every system with a clear SOP so the business owns it, not just you

-Proactively identify new automation opportunities without being asked

-Report weekly to the CEO on what's live, what's in progress, and what's next





What We're Looking For



-You've built production AI systems before — not demos, not prototypes. Things that ran, scaled, and didn't break

-You're fluent in Claude Code and the Anthropic API — you don't need to Google the basics

-You've connected multiple SaaS platforms via API and built automations that replaced human workflows

-You send updates before being asked — if something breaks at 11pm, we know about it before morning

-You've worked in e-commerce or with a DTC brand before — you understand what ad spend, ROAS, and LTV actually mean

-You can work independently with zero technical support — there is no other dev on the team

-You think in systems, not tasks — you see the whole operation and design accordingly

-Python, JavaScript, or equivalent — you can write and read code, not just prompt it





-If you've built AI systems that actually work in production and you want to own the entire function from day one — this is the role.

APPLICATION FORM: 



We will only process candidates who applied via google form

 & Instagram).

, and marketplaces

title: GHL Developer + AI Automation Expert (Part Time to Full TIme)
description:
We are hiring a GoHighLevel Developer and AI Automation Expert to build, optimize, and scale the systems that run our client acquisition, AI product delivery, and client fulfillment operations. This role starts as part-time (20 hours per week) with a clear path to full-time after a 90-day performance review. The right candidate will demonstrate their value fast and earn expanded hours, higher pay, and long-term stability with us.

If you are an automation specialist who thrives in high-growth environments, builds airtight systems, and knows how to integrate AI for maximum efficiency, this is your opportunity to play a key role in a fast-scaling company serving a 447K+ audience and a growing portfolio of enterprise AI build clients.

About Us

Viral Growth Media LLC is an AI automation and digital products company based in Tampa, FL. We operate at the intersection of AI systems, digital marketing, and content creation — serving a 447K+ Instagram audience (20M+ monthly views), an 11,500+
 list, and a growing roster of enterprise clients. We are currently at 344% YoY growth.

Our product stack includes AI-powered digital products, subscription SaaS, one-on-one strategy sessions, and custom enterprise AI builds ($11K–$55K+). You will work directly with the founder and with our clients to build, deploy, and maintain the automation and AI infrastructure that powers everything.

The Role

You will be a core technical executor responsible for building and managing our automation infrastructure, AI agent deployments, and custom client builds. You will work directly with the founder on internal VGM systems and directly with our clients on their individual builds.

This is NOT just a tech role. This is an execution-critical position that directly impacts revenue, client retention, and operational efficiency. You will own projects end-to-end — no layers of management, no committees, just you shipping fast and clean.

What You Will Build

? GoHighLevel sub-accounts, pipelines, workflows, snapshots, SaaS mode, and white-label configurations

? AI agent systems using OpenAI, Claude, and other LLMs — internal and client-facing

? Multi-platform automation flows with 
, n8n, Zapier, and custom webhooks

? Content automation pipelines (video generation, multi-platform publishing, lead capture)

? Custom client websites and dashboards deployed via Vercel, Netlify, or Replit

? Integrations across HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Blotato, Captions, Supabase, Notion, ClickUp, and similar tools

? Custom React or Next.js builds when native tools are not enough

? Real-time tracking dashboards and reporting automations

Required Experience

? Minimum 3 years GoHighLevel experience — sub-accounts, SaaS mode, white-label, GHL API

? Expert-level knowledge of 
, n8n, Zapier, and webhook/API integration

? Proven AI build experience — prompt engineering, OpenAI/Claude API, agent workflows

? JavaScript, React, and Next.js proficiency

? Git/GitHub workflow experience

? Experience deploying on Vercel, Netlify, or Replit

? Fluent English, written and spoken — this is a client-facing role

? Able to record clear Loom walkthroughs for non-technical clients

? Available during US Eastern time zone (at least 4 hours of overlap with 9 AM – 6 PM EST)

? Portfolio of actual GHL builds required to apply — no portfolio, no consideration

? Comfortable with Hubstaff time tracking from day one

Bonus Skills

? Python experience for LLM automation and local model deployment

? Experience with local LLMs (Mistral, Llama 3, Ollama, LM Studio)

? LangChain or LlamaIndex experience

? AI content tools: HeyGen Avatar IV, ElevenLabs, Captions AI, Blotato

? Supabase, Firebase, or PostgreSQL backend experience

? Notion API and ClickUp API automation experience

? Previous experience with US-based clients

Who You Are

? Execution-focused — you ship, you do not stall

? Highly analytical and data-driven

? You can troubleshoot and optimize workflows FAST — speed matters

? You hate waste and inefficiency

? You thrive under clear expectations and real ownership

? You document your work well so nothing depends on your memory

? You communicate proactively — if something is stuck, you flag it immediately

Why Join Us

? Part-time role (20 hrs/week) with clear path to full-time after 90-day review based on performance

? Direct founder access — no middle management, real decision-making speed

? Own projects end-to-end from architecture to deployment

? Exposure to high-end AI builds, enterprise clients, and cutting-edge tools

? Growth path to senior developer or technical lead as we scale

? Competitive pay with performance-based raises, paid bi-weekly via Wise (USD or PHP)

? Philippine holidays respected

Work Environment

We use Hubstaff for time tracking across all contractors. Time is billed only when actively working on assigned VGM tasks. Daily hour cap of 4 hours during the 20-hour part-time phase, expanding to 8 hours once you move to full-time. Every billed hour must tie to a specific deliverable — a commit, a deployment, a GHL change, or a Loom walkthrough.

Work on projects for outside companies during VGM tracked time is strictly prohibited. The use of mouse jigglers, keyboard emulators, or any tool designed to simulate activity is grounds for immediate termination. Apps & URLs reports are reviewed each pay period.

We are direct, fast-moving, and expect the same. If you need constant hand-holding, this is not the role for you. If you thrive under clear expectations and real ownership, you will love it here.

How To Apply

Send a message through OnlineJobs.ph with ALL of the following:

? Portfolio link with at least 3 GHL builds you have deployed (include Loom walkthroughs or demo credentials)

? Answer to this question: “Describe the most complex AI agent or automation workflow you have built. What tools did it use, what problem did it solve, and how did you deploy it?”

? Your current availability in hours per week, including EST overlap

? Your expected monthly salary in USD

? A Loom video (under 3 minutes) introducing yourself and walking through one project you are proud of. Clear English, clear screen share. This is required.

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed. This is a client-facing role and we need to see you communicate in English naturally.

We are hiring immediately. Strong candidates will be contacted within 48 hours. The first 90 days are part-time (20 hrs/week) to evaluate fit and output quality. Strong performers transition to full-time with a pay increase.

This is a role for A-players. If you are obsessed with optimizing systems and shipping clean builds fast, apply now.

title: Reddit Growth & Community Specialist
description:
Location: Remote 



The Role

We are looking for a Reddit native who understands that traditional marketing dies on Reddit. Your mission is to build brand authority, nurture credible accounts, and integrate Penji into relevant conversations without ever looking like an "ad."

We don’t want someone who just posts links. We need a strategist who understands "Reddiquette," knows how to farm karma authentically, and can navigate the platform's unique culture to drive genuine interest and traffic.



About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



Your Key Objectives (The KPIs)

You are here to solve our visibility problem on the world’s most skeptical platform. Your success will be measured by:

• Account Credibility & Karma Growth: Building and maintaining at least 3-5 high-authority accounts with aged history and significant organic karma.

• Subreddit Integration: Successfully placing Penji into top-tier industry discussions (Design, SaaS, Entrepreneurship) with a 0% "shill" detection rate.

• Qualified Traffic & Mentions: Driving consistent, trackable click-throughs or brand mentions through high-value, upvoted comments and posts.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Strategic Account Nurturing: Daily engagement to build account history and "street cred" before any marketing initiatives begin.

• Subreddit Scouting: Identifying and monitoring "gold mine" subreddits where our target audience hangs out.

• Native Content Creation: Drafting "Reddit-first" content (value-driven guides, witty replies, or teardowns) that naturally mentions our services.

• Sentiment Management: Monitoring brand mentions and jumping into threads to provide value, solve problems, or pivot conversations toward Penji.



Who You Are

• Reddit Native: You have personal accounts with high karma and a deep history of participation. You "get" the jokes, the 
s, and the rules.

• A "Stealth" Marketer: You know how to promote a product by not promoting it. You lead with value and let the curiosity do the selling.

• Exceptional Writer: You can mimic the specific tone of different subreddits—from professional/technical to casual/snarky.

• Resilient: You aren't afraid of the "anti-work" or "anti-corporate" crowd; you know how to navigate them with grace.

 

How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form:

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: Sales Outreach Specialist / Point of Contact (Remote)
description:
The Role

We are looking for a highly strategic, results-driven Sales Outreach Specialist to serve as our primary Point of Contact (POC) for new business development. Your mission is to lead our outbound efforts across multiple channels—LinkedIn,
, and beyond—to turn cold prospects into booked calendar meetings.

We don't want a "bot" or someone who just hits "send" on a template. We need a skilled communicator who can navigate different platforms, bypass the noise, and build immediate, authentic rapport with our target audience wherever they are found.



Your Key Objectives (The KPIs)

You are coming in to build a lead-generation machine. Your success will be measured by:

• Scheduling 10 Qualified Demos Per Week: This is your North Star. Whether the lead comes from LinkedIn, a cold
, or a niche community, the goal is a booked meeting.

• Creating Repeatable Frameworks: You aren't just sending messages; you are documenting what works. Your mandate is to translate successful tactics into structured sequences and playbooks that the wider Penji team can adopt.

• High Response Rate Optimization: You will ruthlessly A/B test hooks, value propositions, and follow-up timing to push our outreach metrics to the absolute limit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Multi-Channel Prospecting: Identifying and building lists of highly qualified leads across various professional platforms.

• Strategic Outbound Messaging: Crafting personalized, engaging cold messages and structured follow-up sequences that drive responses.

• Inbox Management & Triage: Handling incoming replies dynamically. You must overcome objections, answer initial questions, and seamlessly pivot conversations toward a booked demo.

• Iterative Optimization: You own the process. You will test, tweak, and figure out the exact messaging angles that convert for different segments of our audience.



Who You Are

• Experienced Hunter: You have a proven track record of booking B2B meetings through outbound outreach (not just limited to one platform).

• A Process Designer: You don't need hand-holding. You know how to take a winning conversation and turn it into a "system" that others can follow.

• Copywriting Sharpness: You know how to write concise, punchy messages that get busy decision-makers to actually hit "reply."

• Fluent in English: Excellent written communication skills with a firm grasp of a professional, conversational business tone.



About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form: 

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

description:

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

YOUR IMPACT

 triggers)

Architecture & Optimization

 experience

title: Professional LinkedIn Outreach Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



The Role

We are looking for a highly strategic, results-driven LinkedIn Outreach Specialist to join our team at Penji. Your primary mission is simple but challenging: turn cold LinkedIn connections into booked calendar meetings and drive our growth forward.

We don't want someone who just clicks "connect" and relies on generic, automated spam. We need a skilled conversationalist who understands B2B networking, knows how to bypass the noise, and can build immediate, authentic rapport with our target audience.



Your Key Objectives (The KPIs)

You are coming in to solve a specific problem: filling our pipeline. Your success will be measured by:

• Scheduling 10 Qualified Demos Per Week: This is your primary North Star. Every action you take should drive toward this number.

• Maintaining an Exceptionally High Response Rate: We set our standards aggressively high. While our ultimate stretch goal is a 50% response rate, we know that requires world-class execution. Your mandate is to ruthlessly A/B test, refine targeting, and optimize copy to push our metrics to the absolute limit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Targeted Prospecting: Identify and build lists of highly qualified leads on LinkedIn.

• Outbound Messaging: Craft personalized, engaging connection requests and follow-up sequences.

• Inbox Management & Triage: Handle responses dynamically. Overcome objections, answer initial questions, and seamlessly pivot conversations toward a booked demo.

• Iterative Optimization: You will be expected to test, tweak, and figure out the exact messaging angles that convert our specific audience. You own the process.



Who You Are

• Experienced: You have a proven track record of booking B2B meetings specifically through LinkedIn outreach.

• A Strategic Thinker: You don't need hand-holding. You know how to take an aggressive goal and figure out the "how" to get there.

• Copywriting Sharpness: You know how to write concise, punchy messages that get decision-makers to actually hit "reply."

• Fluent in English: Excellent written communication skills with a firm grasp of a professional, conversational business tone.



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form: 

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.
