title: Survey Fielding Manager – Opinion Research
description:
FOR APPLICANTS WITH HANDS-ON SURVEY PROGRAMMING AND FIELDING EXPERIENCE IN PUBLIC OPINION OR MARKET RESEARCH



Remote, (Eastern Time Zone)



Who You Are

You program survey instruments, manage the field, clean the data, coordinate with vendors, and keep projects moving on schedule. You've done this work hands-on at a research firm (not in an academic setting), and you're comfortable owning the technical execution of multiple projects at once.



You may be a fit if:

* You have programmed surveys in Alchemer, Qualtrics, or a comparable professional survey platform - and can set up skip logic, quotas, randomization, piping, and multilanguage surveys without hand-holding

* You've managed survey fielding from launch through close: monitoring quotas, tracking sample quality, and keeping projects on timeline

* You've coordinated with external vendors - panel providers, call centers, mail houses - and can manage those relationships independently

* You have experience with sample preparation: lists manipulation, deduplication, creating clean sample files, generating unique identifiers

* You are meticulous about data quality - you catch errors before they reach anyone else

* You take initiative, ask questions when something is unclear, and don't wait to be told what to do next

* You're comfortable jumping between multiple projects in a fast-paced environment

* You are proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel and PowerPoint

* You can create basic graphics using AI, Canva, or Adobe tools



What you'll do:

* Program and test online surveys in our survey platform, including
 and texting campaigns, logic testing, and distribution setup

* Monitor and manage survey fielding: track quotas, sample quality, response rates, and project timelines

* Coordinate with external vendors - online panel providers, call centers, and mail vendors - and provide regular updates to internal project managers

* Prepare and clean sample files: create organized sample files, generate unique data fields

* Develop mail materials and coordinate with internal team and external mail vendors

* Perform data cleaning on survey outputs to verify data quality and integrity

* Code and analyze open-ended responses

* QC all deliverables: cross-check data sets, verify formatting, catch errors before client delivery

* Build charts, reporting visuals, and basic dashboards in PowerPoint, Canva, or Looker Studio

* Support the research team across the full project lifecycle



What we're NOT looking for:

Someone whose survey experience is limited to academic research or distributing simple online links



Required qualifications:

* At least one year of experience programming and fielding surveys in a professional opinion or market research setting

* Proficiency in online survey programming with a survey platform (tell us which ones you know well)

* Experience managing fielding for market research or public opinion research studies

* Experience with data cleaning and response monitoring

* Strong English writing, proofreading, and communication skills

* Bachelor's degree in marketing, political science, communication, business administration, or a related field



Preferred:

* Experience with SPSS, R, Wincross, or similar statistical/tabulation software



What we provide:

* A collaborative team

* A supportive environment where asking questions is encouraged

* Company-paid PhilHealth or HMO

* 13th month pay

* Paid time off



TO APPLY:

Send a link to your resume and LinkedIn profile. Also tell us:?

1. Which survey platform(s) have you programmed in, and approximately how many surveys have you built?

2. Describe one project where you managed fielding from start to finish - what was the methodology, and what did you personally handle?



Put Survey Fielding Manager in the subject line. Use 5 apply points.

I am Adam Probolsky. I will read your application personally. This position is available immediately.



About Probolsky Research: We are a Latina- and woman-owned market and opinion research firm working for corporate, election, government, and nonprofit clients.

title: Social Media Manager + Growth Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a Social Media Manager that is results driven and can fully own our organic social presence end-to-end—from content planning to editing to posting to performance. You’ll take our raw footage and turn it into high-performing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts, while managing the full publishing workflow and voice. This is not just an editing role. We need someone who can run the organic social machine—plan, edit, write, publish, and improve performance weekly and most importantly delivery RESULTS!



What You’ll Do

1) Short-Form Editing & Repurposing (Core)

- Repurpose multiple raw video files into multiple short clips/variations optimized for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts

- Identify the best 
nts: angles, reactions, micro-
nts, emotional hooks, and product highlights

- Craft strong openings (first 1–2 seconds) that capture attention immediately

- Add high-converting on-screen text (captions/typography) that supports a luxury, premium look

- Deliver edits that are polished, on-brand, and platform-optimized (safe zones, formatting, pacing, clarity)

- Color-correct and enhance footage with clean, intentional grading

- Produce several variations so we can test hooks, text, and pacing across platforms



2) Social Media Management (End-to-End Ownership)

- Own our organic social execution: content planning ? creation/editing ? posting ? reporting

- Build and manage a simple weekly content calendar (Reels/TikTok/Shorts + supporting stories/posts as needed)

- Write premium, on-brand captions/copy (including hooks, CTAs, and event/product messaging)

- Handle posting/publishing across platforms with correct formatting, titles, hashtags/keywords (as appropriate), and timing

- Manage basic community engagement: replying to comments/DMs with brand voice guidelines (as assigned)

- Track performance weekly (views, retention, saves, shares, profile actions, clicks) and report what’s working

- Make iteration decisions based on performance: double down on winners, improve hooks, adjust pacing and messaging



Creative & Performance Mindset

- Maintain a natural, authentic feel (UGC energy is welcome) while still keeping everything clean and premium

- Trends are welcome only if applied in a sophisticated, intentional way (not loud or chaotic)

- Content should drive engagement and action (event ticket sales, product interest, brand trust) while reinforcing exclusivity and quality

- Communicate progress clearly and deliver within agreed timelines



Style & Brand Expectations (Very Important)

- Overall Style: Elevated luxury aesthetic — clean, polished editing

- No flashy effects, gimmicky transitions, overdone presets, or anything that cheapens the premium feel

- Tone & Feel: Minimal, high-end, cinematic foundation with UGC elements

- Goals: Virality + conversions



Requirements

- Proven experience managing and growing social accounts and editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

- Strong video editing skills: pacing, storytelling, custom color grading, sound, and premium typography

- Strong understanding of hooks (especially the first 2 seconds) and retention

- Strong copywriting for social (hooks, captions, CTAs, event/product positioning)

- Reliable turnaround times + clear communication

- Familiarity with luxury/fashion & event brands and premium storytelling



Bonus (not required)

- Ability to produce AI-generated video when requested (specific concepts/campaigns we assign)

- Experience with AI video tools/models (e.g., Higgsfield, Gemini, Kling, etc.) with control over style and consistency

- Ability to integrate AI-generated clips into a polished edit

- Access to a personal creative studio or professional filming setup, with the ability to capture occasional high-quality footage to complement our existing assets.



What Success Looks Like

- Premium consistency: Every post looks and feels elevated, cinematic, and on-brand—no “cheap” edits.

- High-performing short-form machine: Raw footage becomes multiple polished clips with tested variations.

- Stronger attention + retention: Openings consistently grab attention in the first 1–2 seconds and keep viewers watching.

- Clear brand voice: Captions and on-screen text feel luxury, intentional, and aligned with our faith-based message.

- System + ownership: You run the weekly workflow (planning ? editing ? writing ? posting ? reporting) with minimal oversight.

- Growth that matters: Engagement rises (saves/shares), community strengthens, and content drives action (event tickets + product demand).



To Apply Please Share:

Your best short-form portfolio (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

1–2 examples where you managed posting + copywriting (not just editing)

A brief note on your workflow: how you plan, batch edit, publish, and report performance

title: Remote Cleaning Business- Virtual Assistant
description:
Remote Cleaning Business – Admin/CSR Virtual Assistant (US Hours)



About Us:

We run a growing remote cleaning business serving residential and commercial clients. We manage bookings, cleaners, and customer support — all remotely.



Your Role:

Respond to client inquiries, send and follow up on quotes through BookingKoala, schedule cleaners, manage customer communication, and request reviews. You’ll also follow up with leads and help convert inquiries into booked jobs.



Requirements:

Excellent English communication, reliable internet, and availability during US business hours. Experience with BookingKoala, Stripe, Slack, and Google Sheets is preferred.

Cleaning industry, property management, or prior VA experience with US clients is a plus.

Sales or lead conversion experience is a strong plus.



Pay & Schedule:

$2–$5 USD/hour, paid bi-weekly. Includes commission for bookings you help close, plus bonuses for reviews and performance.

title: Video Editor for Fast Growing E-Commerce Company - Ready to start TODAY!
description:
We’re looking for a Video Editor who understands performance — not just aesthetics. Must have E-Commerce experience.



Someone who can turn raw footage, UGC, testimonials, and scripts into scroll-stopping ads that retain attention, tell a story, and convert.



About Us:

We’re a fast-growing DTC skincare brand focused on emotional storytelling, relatable content, and data-backed ad testing. Our videos don’t just “look nice” — they solve real skin problems, build trust, and drive sales.



What You’ll Do:

• Edit high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, Amazon, and landing pages

• Take raw UGC, product shots, testimonials, reviews, before/after clips — and turn them into persuasive ads

• Add hooks, subtitles, overlays, proof points, and call-to-actions based on provided scripts/briefs

• Use feedback and performance metrics (CTR, watch time, ROAS) to improve and refine ad versions

• Create multiple variations from the same footage to test different hooks, angles, pacing, and formats



You’d Be a Great Fit If You:

• Think in terms of retention, clarity, storytelling, and conversion — not just visuals

• Have experience editing for DTC brands (beauty, skincare, supplements, self-care is a plus)

• Understand how to build videos around: hook ? story/problem ? solution ? proof ? CTA

• Are comfortable editing content filmed by real people (UGC, phone footage, testimonials)

• Know platform formats and editing styles for TikTok, Reels, ads, and Amazon video placements



Bonus Points If You:

• Have edited ads that performed well (high ROAS, high retention, viral, or successfully scaled)

• Can organize and tag footage, build structured timelines, and create modular editable templates

• Have basic knowledge of direct-response psychology or what makes people click, trust, and buy

• Can repurpose long clips into short ads and short clips into engaging compilations



To Apply, please send:

• A few examples of video ads you’ve edited (preferably performance-focused, not cinematic reels)

• A short note on how you approach editing for conversion vs aesthetics

• Your typical availability (hourly, monthly, or project-based)

title: Senior AU Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role

 

We are seeking an experienced tax accountant with a strong background in Australian taxation and proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360. The ideal candidate will have at least four years of experience in Australian tax and accounting and will be responsible for preparing financial statements and tax returns for various entity types, including companies, trusts, partnerships, and individuals.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

• Prepare financial statements and tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, individuals and SMSFs.

• Ensure compliance with Australian tax laws, including income tax, GST, and BAS reporting.

• Reconcile accounts and manage general ledger entries.

• Work with Xero & BGLSF360 to process transactions, maintain records, and generate reports.

• Assist in tax planning strategies and provide general tax advice as required.

• Communicate with the team to ensure deadlines and client expectations are met.

• Looking at implementing and providing Advisory information to the Director

• Assist the Director with initial reviews of financial statements, tax returns, and supporting workpapers.

• Identify basic errors, inconsistencies, and missing information prior to final review.

• Support the team by helping improve accuracy and completeness of work before submission to the Director.

 

Key Requirements

 

• Minimum 4 years of experience in Australian tax and accounting.

• Strong English literacy and speaking skills

• Proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360 (negotiable) and cloud-based accounting software.

• Strong knowledge of Australian taxation, including company tax, trust distributions, BAS, IAS, and GST.

• Experience preparing tax returns and financial statements for various entity structures.

• Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage workloads efficiently.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

 

 

What We Offer

 

• Competitive salary based on experience.

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunity to work with a growing Australian accounting firm.

• Ongoing training and development to enhance your skills.

• Long-term career growth potential.

 

If you meet the qualifications and are looking for a long-term opportunity in an Australian accounting firm, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

Analytics & Reporting: Track key metrics (e.g., engagement, reach, conversion) and prepare regular reports for management.

Experience: Usually 3–4+ years of professional experience in social media, marketing, or community management.

Degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or a related field, though professional experience is preferred.

title: Video editor — short-form paid media (Meta Ads)
description:
We're looking for a talented video editor to join our team on a part-time basis, with the opportunity to grow into a full-time role as production scales. This is a creative, asset-driven editing role — you won't be shooting anything. Your job is to work with an existing footage library and new scripts to produce high-converting Meta Ads, consistently and at pace.



Our editing style:

We have an established editing style that we want maintained across all videos. Before applying, please watch the example videos below to get a feel for the look, pacing, and overall aesthetic we work to.



Example videos here: 



We expect all edits to be consistent with this style. If you feel you can match and work within this aesthetic, we'd love to hear from you.



How the work flows:

Most of your time will be spent working within an existing footage library — both raw clips and finished, previously edited videos. New footage will be added to the library over time, but the focus of this role is on getting maximum value out of what already exists.



You'll receive scripts with AI-generated voiceovers (cloned voice) and your job is to match the right footage to each script, edit the video to a high standard, and deliver something that stops the scroll and converts. Occasionally I'll provide specific footage for a video, but most of the time you'll be selecting and repurposing from the library creatively.



What you'll be doing day-to-day:

- Edit short-form video ads for Meta using AI voiceovers, library footage, captions, background music, sound effects, pop-ups, and motion effects — consistently matching our established editing style



- Strip finished videos back to raw clips — removing captions, music, sound effects, overlays, and any added elements — so the clean footage can be re-edited with new scripts



- Repurpose existing footage in fresh and creative ways — finding new angles, cuts, and sequences that suit a newscript rather than reusing the same edit



- Sync AI voiceovers to footage accurately and ensure audio levels, pacing, and timing feel natural and polished



- Keep the footage library organised and maintain clear file naming and version control so assets are easy to find and reuse



Requirements:

- Minimum 2 years' experience editing short-form video content for paid social — Meta Ads 
 and Instagram) experience is a must



- Demonstrated ability to deconstruct finished, edited videos and strip them back to clean, usable raw clips



- Ability to work within and maintain an established editing style — consistency across all deliverables is important to us



- Strong creative instincts — you know how to use captions, pacing, music, sound design, and visual effects to make content engaging and drive action



- Comfortable repurposing the same footage across multiple scripts without making videos feel repetitive or recycled



- Proficient in professional editing software — please specify what you use (e.g. Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve)



- Reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling video editing efficiently



- Self-directed and organised — able to manage a queue of videos, meet deadlines, and communicate proactively



To apply, please include:

1: A brief intro about yourself and your editing experience



2: 2–3 examples of Meta Ads or short-form video content you've edited (Google Drive link preferred)



3: A brief note on how you would approach matching and maintaining our editing style based on the example video



4: The software you edit in and your availability in hours per week



5: Your monthly rate in Philippine Peso (PHP) for 20 hours of work per week

title: Tekla Structures BIM Customization Specialist
description:
HIRING: Tekla Structures BIM Customization Specialist

Full-Time | Work From Home | U.S. Steel Detailing Firm



Magandang araw! We are Kruew, a well-established steel detailing firm based in the U.S., and we are looking for a highly technical Tekla Structures specialist from the Philippines to join our team permanently.



This is a rare, specialized opportunity — not a modeling role. We need someone who builds the tools, components, and environments that the entire detailing team depends on.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

- Creating and maintaining drawing templates, report templates, and title blocks

- Managing the firm's Tekla environment folder structure across all active client projects

- Deploying and updating environment files, catalogs, and configurations consistently

- Onboarding new projects with properly configured Tekla setups from day one



YOU ARE THE RIGHT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

- At least 3 years of hands-on Tekla Structures experience (detailing or BIM)

- At least 3 years of Tekla Open API development using C# / .NET

- At least 3 years of Trimble Connect experience

- Strong experience building and editing parametric custom components

- Experience with drawing templates and XSR/XSL-based reports

- Deep understanding of Tekla's environment folder architecture (firm, project, model)



BONUS POINTS FOR:

- Experience with Tekla Warehouse

- Python or PowerShell scripting for automation



BENEFITS:

- 100% work from home

- Paid training and onboarding

- Pay raise opportunities

- Additional leave

- Company Christmas gift and events



COMPENSATION:

PHP 200–300 per hour | Full-time | Permanent



TO APPLY:

PLEASE ANSWER THESE QUESTIONS IN YOUR APPLICATION:

1. Have you built or customized parametric components (connections, details, parts) in Tekla?

2. Are you comfortable working remotely on the night shift or U.S. business hours?

3. Are you amenable to the following:  COMPENSATION: PHP 200–300 per hour | Full-time 40hours/week| Permanent



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. Serious applicants only—we will verify your experience during the interview process. Thank you!

title: Real Estate Title & Records Research Specialist
description:
ABOUT US

We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company focused on in-depth property research, locating owners and heirs, gathering public records, and helping resolve title defects.



THE ROLE

- This role combines property research, data gathering, information filtering, and CRM data entry.

- Your work will help our team resolve title issues by uncovering missing ownership, probate, and record information.

- Please do not apply if your experience is limited to data entry, simple owner lookups, lead scraping, list pulling, or surface-level real estate VA work.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Deep research experience beyond basic property lookups.

- Hands-on experience tracing deceased owners through probate courts, building family trees, and identifying breaks or gaps in ownership history.

- Familiarity with deeds, liens, mortgages, probate, chain of title, and title defects.

- 
 and FindAGrave experience strongly preferred.

- Reliable high-speed internet and a dual-monitor setup are required.

- Strong English reading comprehension for legal and court documents.



BONUS EXPERIENCE

- Tax-sale overages, excess proceeds, surplus-funds, or claimant research is a plus.



SCHEDULE & COMPENSATION

- Approximately 15 hours/week between 10:00 AM and 3:00 PM ET, Monday-Friday (exact schedule to be agreed).

- $5.00/hour, paid weekly.



HOW TO APPLY

1. Tell us about your experience with U.S. property records, including which counties, states, or online portals you've used most often.

2. List up to 5 research tools you use regularly, starting with the one you use most.

3. Tell us your available hours in Eastern Time and confirm that you have a dual-monitor setup.

4. Describe one specific research challenge you've handled, such as a deceased owner with no clear heirs, a broken chain of title, a tax-sale overage claim, or a hard-to-locate owner. Explain the steps you took, the records you searched, and how you reached your conclusion.

title: AOL Genius
description:
AOL Operations Genius – Leading Australian Finance Broking Business



About the Role

This is a very busy, high?impact role supporting a leading Australian finance broking business. You will be the engine behind the brokers – owning AOL work, operations, administration, client coordination and keeping everything organised, accurate and moving quickly.



The ideal candidate is highly organised, energetic and has a strong “can?do” approach, keen to take on a wide variety of tasks with the drive to constantly improve the client experience and internal efficiency.



Key Responsibilities

AOL & Lending Operations  -this is the main part of the role



Work in AOL every day to support brokers with pricing,  and lodgements.



Enter and maintain accurate data in AOL for all client applications and opportunities.



Use AOL to track deals from initial scenario through to lodgement, approval and settlement.

Identify and fix data issues in AOL and proactively clean up and organise records.

Respond to inbound communications on multiple platforms (phone,
, messages) in a professional and friendly manner.

Provide quality customer service so clients feel looked after, supported and confident in our process.



Maintain accurate, timely and comprehensive records in our systems (AOL, CRM, spreadsheets, drive folders, task boards).



Assist with preparation of summaries, checklists and basic documentation for the brokers.



Help track applications, follow up required documents and keep all moving parts organised.



Perform other administration tasks that support the broader team and improve turnaround times.



Continually look for better ways of operating and suggest improvements to systems, templates and processes.



Ideal Candidate Profile

Experience & Skills (Non?negotiable)



Minimum 5 years’ experience working in AOL every day in an Australian mortgage/finance broking environment.



Previous experience in an administrative role in finance (mortgage broking, lending, banking, or similar).



Strong computer skills – comfortable with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Drive), Excel and web?based business tools.



Proven ability to pick up new software systems and tools quickly.



Naturally pays close attention to detail – especially with names, numbers, dates and documents.



Communication & Attitude



Client?oriented, outgoing and friendly with a professional and approachable communication style.



Strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication skills with excellent phone etiquette.



You MUST have great spoken English and feel confident talking to clients and tea
mbers.



You MUST love talking to and helping people – you enjoy solving problems and putting people at ease.



Strong sense of personal integrity and confidentiality.



Able to work independently while being a part of a team.



Not afraid to ask questions and clarify instructions when needed.



Work Setup & Schedule

Full?time, long?term role (work?from?home).



Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace.



Willing and able to work mainly in Australian business hours -AWST (with some flexibility by agreement).



Important: Video Application Requirement

Please follow these instructions carefully:

In the video, please:



Introduce yourself (name, location, total years in finance and specifically in AOL).



Explain your day?to?day responsibilities using AOL in your current or previous roles.



Describe one example where your use of AOL helped a broker or client get a better outcome or faster result.



Tell us about a time you handled a difficult client or situation and how you resolved it.



What We Offer

Stable, long?term role with a growing Australian finance broking business.



A chance to become the key AOL and operations person in the company.



Direct access to the business owner and senior brokers; your ideas will be heard.



A supportive team that values initiative, continuous improvement and clear communication.



How to Apply



Your updated resume.



A short cover letter explaining why you are the right AOL Operations Genius  for this role.



The link to your application video (required).



If this is you, you should apply. Send your applications to:

title: Social Media Manager (YouTube Expert) /Graphic Designer/Website Manager/Go High Level (GHL); Copywriter/Growth Manager
description:
Job Title:  Content & Operations Manager (YouTube + Travel Brand Growth)



Cross Functional:   Social Media Manager (YouTube Expert) /Graphic Designer/Website 

Manager/Go High Level (GHL); Copywriter/Growth Manager



Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



About the Company

iTravel for Culture is a growing travel documentary brand and YouTube channel hosted by Gibbs—a business builder turned cultural storyteller.



The brand explores culture through everyday people—food, music, traditions, and communities—told with a cinematic, grounded style inspired by Anthony Bourdain.



What started as a YouTube channel is now expanding into a curated tourism company, offering real-world travel experiences based on the stories we tell.



***We are a few hundred subscribers away from monetization.

*** YouTube is our primary growth engine.

***This role will directly impact how fast we grow.

***Read This First (Important)***

This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role.



If you are someone who:

+Waits for instructions

+Needs step-by-step guidance

+Submits work with frequent errors

=This role will not work for you.



We are looking for someone who:

+Thinks independently

+Anticipates needs

+Takes ownership of outcomes

+Executes at a high level without constant supervision



The Role

You will act as a Content & Operations Manager—supporting the growth of the YouTube channel while helping build the tourism side of the business.



You will work directly with Gibbs (the host) and help manage the day-to-day execution of content and platforms.



*** You will also communicate and respond on platforms as if you are Gibbs, maintaining brand voice and tone.

***Bonus if you have advanced skill in developing, designing, building, updating, and maintaining websites and SEO strategy there may be extra work available to you.  Please mention this in your response.  



Key Responsibilities of primary job

1. YouTube Management & Monetization (Primary Focus)

Upload and fully optimize videos (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails)

Use tools like VidIQ to improve SEO and reach

Ensure every video is positioned for maximum CTR and watch time

Track performance and suggest improvements

Help move the channel to and beyond monetization

***You must understand YouTube strategy—not just uploading.



2. Social Media Management

Manage and post across:

Instagram


TikTok

YouTube (primary)

Repurpose YouTube content for short-form platforms

Write captions and respond to comments/messages in Gibbs’ voice

Maintain consistent brand tone across all platforms



3. Graphic Design - Thumbnail Creation & Visual Content

Design high-CTR YouTube thumbnails

Create supporting graphics for social and promotions

Maintain consistent brand look and feel

*** This role replaces a previous graphic designer—you must be capable here.



4. Website & Content Uploads

Upload videos and content to the website

Publish:

Travel guides

Experience pages

Blog/cultural content

Ensure formatting, accuracy, and quality



5. CRM & Marketing Support – Go High Level (GHL)

Use Go High Level (GHL) for:

Lead tracking

Automation support

Contact organization

Support promotions and audience engagement workflows



6. Organization & Operations

Maintain clean file systems and content organization

Coordinate assets (videos, thumbnails, captions, etc.)

Ensure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes



7. Strategic Thinking

Identify what needs to be done without being told

Suggest improvements to content, systems, and growth strategy

Help connect YouTube growth to the tourism business



Required Skills:

Strong written English (natural, conversational, culturally aware)

YouTube SEO + optimization knowledge

Social media management experience

Graphic design skills (thumbnails + branding)

Strong attention to detail (very important)

Ability to think critically and work independently



Required Tools / Applications:

You must already have experience using:

Go High Level (GHL)

VidIQ

Graphic Design Software (Photoshop, Canva, or equivalent)



Key Skill Areas

Social Media Management

Website Content Management

Virtual File Organization

Branding & Visual Consistency

Promotions & Audience Engagement

Thumbnail Creation (High CTR Focus)



Work Structure;

Part-time role

~16 hours per week (~64 hours per month)

Flexible schedule based on workload

Paid monthly in advance

Fully remote

***This role will grow as the company grows.



Who This Role Is For

You will do well if you:

Take initiative without being told

Catch mistakes before submitting work

Care about quality and performance

Are curious about travel, culture, and storytelling

Want to grow with a brand long-term



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

We are intentionally filtering for serious candidates.



Step 1: Written Response

Answer the following:

Why are you a strong fit for this role?

What would you do to help a YouTube channel reach monetization faster?

What makes a thumbnail high CTR? (Be specific)



Step 2: Proof of Work

Provide:

2–3 thumbnails you created

1 example of a YouTube video you optimized (if available)

Any social media accounts you have managed



Step 3: Attention Test

Include this line at the top of your application:



“How I do my work matters.”

*** Applications without this line will not be reviewed.



Final Note

This role requires:

Ownership

Precision

Initiative



If you are the type of person who sees what needs to be done and handles it—this is a long-term opportunity.  If not, this is not the right fit.

• Listing agent
 (if publicly available)

Target Geography:

You will be assigned specific zip codes in the North Fort Worth / Wise County / Denton County area including but not limited to: 76071, 76052, 76179, 76131, 76177, 76247, 76078, 76244, 76248, 76020, 76023. New zip codes will be added as the database grows.



Target Price Range:

Focus on sold homes between $220,000 and $650,000 only. Skip anything outside this range.



What We’re Looking For:

The ideal candidate is someone who takes pride in clean, accurate work and understands that the quality of this database directly impacts real business results. You must be proficient in Google Sheets including basic formatting, duplicate detection, and data organization. You should be comfortable conducting manual research across multiple websites simultaneously and cross-referencing information for accuracy.



Experience with real estate platforms like 
 and Zillow is strongly preferred. We are building a professional outreach database, so experience building lead lists, contact databases, or outreach lists for sales teams is a major plus. 



Attention to detail is non-negotiable. This role requires clean, consistent, verified data entry. Sloppy or unverified records are not acceptable and will be flagged immediately. If you are someone who takes shortcuts, this is not the right fit. If you are someone who takes pride in delivering spotless work, we want to hear from you.



Requirements:

• Proficient in Google Sheets including formatting, organization, and duplicate detection

• Comfortable researching across multiple websites simultaneously

• Experience with 
, Zillow, or similar real estate platforms

• Strong attention to detail — data accuracy is critical

• Available for at least 10-15 hours per week

What Success Looks Like:

Delivering
clean, verified records per week with consistent formatting and zero duplicate entries. Speed and accuracy will improve as you become familiar with the target zip codes and data format. Weekly output will be reviewed and constructive feedback provided to help you continuously improve.



Compensation:

$5-6 USD per hour depending on experience. Paid weekly via Wise or PayPal.



To Apply:

Please send a short message explaining any experience you have with real estate research, data entry, or lead list building. Include the word “NorthTexas” somewhere in your application so I know you read this fully.

title: Customer Service Representative – Workers Comp Drug and Alcohol Testing
description:
CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE – WORKERS’ COMPENSATION 

DRUG & ALCOHOL TESTING (REMOTE – PHILIPPINES) 

*LOCATION: METRO MANILA & CAVITE APPLICANTS ONLY 



=== ABOUT THE ROLE === 

USA Mobile Drug Testing (USAMDT) is hiring a Customer Service Representative (CSR) to support our Workers’ Compensation Drug and Alcohol Testing operations. 



This role works closely with our Workers’ Compensation and Claims teams to process testing requests, coordinate collections, and obtain results as quickly and accurately as possible. Speed, attention to detail, and clear communication are critical. 



This is a specialized CSR position, not a script-based call center role. You will handle live calls, time-sensitive injury-related requests, documentation, and follow-up. 



We operate in a process-driven, accountability-focused environment and are organizing the company around the EOS / Traction framework, emphasizing role clarity, ownership, and disciplined execution. 



This is a long-term role with structured training, scorecards, and defined milestones. 



=== KEY RESPONSIBILITIES === 

PHONE &
 COMMUNICATION 

• Answer inbound calls live and professionally 

• Return voi
s within 30 minutes 

• Respond to
s within 4 hours 

• Interpret unclear or rambling explanations related to injuries or claims 

• Ask clarifying questions to ensure correct testing is ordered 

• Communicate expectations, timelines, and next steps clearly 

• Log all calls and interactions accurately 

• Escalate urgent or high-risk situations immediately 



WORKERS’ COMPENSATION TESTING COORDINATION 

• Process workers’ compensation drug and alcohol testing requests 

• Coordinate with employers, claims teams, collectors, clinics, and labs 

• Schedule collections quickly and accurately 

• Confirm availability before finalizing schedules 

• Prioritize cases based on urgency and client requirements 

• Maintain accurate job and claim status codes 



RESULTS TRACKING & DOCUMENTATION 

• Track collections and follow up on incomplete or missing information 

• Monitor test progress and obtain results as quickly as possible 

• Process paperwork from collectors and clinics 

• Edit and finalize documents using Foxit PDF 

• Upload documents to SharePoint or route results internally 

• Update job logs with donor information, test stages, and claim status 

• Ensure documentation accuracy and compliance 



CUSTOMER & INTERNAL SUPPORT 

• Provide status updates to employers and internal teams 

• Assist with claims-related questions and next-step clarification 

• Maintain professionalism during sensitive or stressful calls 



=== REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS === 

• Minimum 3 years supporting a small U.S.-based company 

• At least 3 years of live voice experience with U.S. customers 

• Strong verbal and written English at a professional level 

• Ability to manage time-sensitive requests in a fast-paced environment 

• Experience with Microsoft Office, SharePoint, and CRM tools 

• Comfort following documented workflows and escalation paths 

• High attention to detail and personal accountability 



=== CRITICAL CHARACTERISTICS FOR SUCCESS === 

The ideal candidate consistently demonstrates: 

• Critical thinking to interpret unclear or rambling explanations 

• Intellectual humility — asks questions and seeks clarity 

• Proactive behavior without waiting for direction 

• Strong sense of urgency, especially for injury-related cases 

• Attention to detail and follow-through 

• Effective priority management and time management 

• Punctuality and reliability 

• Integrity — doing what you said you would do, when you said you would do it, and cleaning it up when you don’t 

• Clear, concise communication that directly addresses the issue at hand 



=== ENGLISH COMMUNICATION REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE) === 

This role requires advanced English communication to support U.S.-based employers and internal claims teams. 



You must be able to: 

• Clearly understand American callers in real time 

• Communicate confidently without scripts 

• Handle urgent or sensitive conversations professionally 



--- USA ENGLISH LIVE CONVERSATION ASSESSMENT --- 

• Shortlisted candidates will complete a real-time English conversation assessment 

• Live voice or video format 

• Scenario-based discussion 

• Accent is not evaluated — clarity, comprehension, and professionalism are 



=== PERSONALITY & WORK-STYLE ASSESSMENT === 

Candidates may be asked to complete a personality or work-style assessment to help evaluate communication style, accountability, and role fit. Results are reviewed alongside interviews and performance indicators and are not used as standalone pass/fail criteria. 



=== POWER, INTERNET & EQUIPMENT REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE) === 

POWER BACKUP 

• Within 90 days, you must have 7–8 hours of reliable backup power 

• Must support a laptop or desktop, second monitor, and modem/router 

• Stand-alone battery solution required (multiple units acceptable) 

• Photos and specifications must be provided 

*** FAILURE TO MEET THIS REQUIREMENT WITHIN 90 DAYS WILL RESULT IN TERMINATION *** 



HEADSET REQUIREMENT 

• Professional noise-cancelling headset suitable for U.S. phone support 

• Clear microphone quality with minimal background noise 

• Approved headset options provided during onboarding 



=== TRAINING, PERFORMANCE & CAREER PROGRESSION === 

INITIAL TRAINING (0–90 DAYS) 

• Workers’ Compensation testing workflows 

• Documentation standards and quality expectations 

• Performance scorecards and accountability metrics 



CSR LEVEL 1 

• Achieved at 90 days with performance score of 4 out of 5 or higher 



CSR LEVEL 2 

• Earned through consistent performance and skill mastery 

• Handles more complex cases with reduced supervision 



This role does not include secondary roles. Focus is on Workers’ Compensation testing accuracy and speed. 



=== COMPENSATION === 

• Compensation range: $4.00 to $7.00 USD per hour 

• $4.00 USD per hour during training 

• Raises at 90 days, 6 months, 9 months, and 12 months (performance-based) 

• Additional incentives tied to KPIs and role proficiency 

 

=== TIME OFF POLICY === 

• First 90 days: No time off 

• Remainder of first year: Up to 5 unpaid days 

• After one year: 5 paid days, usable in 2-hour increments 

Candidates will be asked to disclose any planned time off for the next 12 months during the interview. 



=== IMPORTANT NOTES === 

• Applicants must currently reside in Metro Manila or Cavite 

• This role requires stability, reliability, and long-term commitment

• Applicates can't have more than 2 jobs in 3 years or 3 jobs in 5 years.
salary: $4 per hour USD starting ($5 to $6 av...

title: Drafting and Estimating Administrator
description:
Remote Drafting & Estimating Administrator (Construction / Structural Steel)

Full-Time (40 hrs/week) 

Work Schedule: Must be available during Australian business hours

Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Brisbane (QLD) time

(Includes 1-hour unpaid lunch break and two paid 15-minute breaks)



About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Drafting & Estimating Administrator to provide back-end technical and administrative support within the mining and construction industry, specifically in structural steel fabrication and construction.



This role is critical in ensuring accurate technical documentation, cost estimation, compliance alignment, and overall project support.



Role Overview



This is a multi-functional technical and administrative support role. You will work closely with project managers and engineers to ensure project documentation, compliance requirements, and cost estimates are prepared accurately and on time.



1. Compliance Support

Assist with WHS documentation and compliance tracking

Maintain contractor compliance registers

Support project documentation required for mining and construction site entry. Coordinate the creation of MDR (Manufacturer’s Data Record) packages by collating fabrication drawings, ITPs, material traceability records, weld maps, NDT results, and inspection documentation, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and alignment with project and client requirements.

Track certifications, licences, and expiry dates



2. Drafting Support

Prepare and revise technical drawings using AutoCAD, Tekla, or similar drafting software

Interpret structural and fabrication drawings

Assist in producing shop drawings and as-built documentation

Maintain drawing registers and version control

Coordinate revisions based on engineering or project changes

The ability to create and work with DXF files and NC1 Files





3. Estimating Support

Assist in preparing cost estimates for structural steel projects

Perform quantity take-offs from drawings

Support material costing, labour costing, and project budgeting

Prepare tender documentation support

Maintain estimating records and pricing databases

4. Administrative, Data Entry & Filing

Maintain structured digital filing systems

Ensure accurate data entry into project management systems

Support invoice tracking and documentation collation

Assist with reporting and documentation preparation

Required Skills & Experience

Technical Skills

Proven experience in drafting or construction drafting

Experience supporting estimating in construction or fabrication projects

Strong proficiency in AutoCAD or similar CAD software

Ability to interpret engineering drawings

Experience working within mining or construction environments 

Administrative & Compliance Skills

Strong document control experience

Familiarity with construction compliance 

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organisational skills

Systems & Software

Microsoft Office Suite and Microsoft 365 Suite

Project management or construction software

Cloud document management platforms

Soft Skills

Strong written communication skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously

Proactive and solution-focused mindset

High level of confidentiality and professionalism





Qualifications

Degree in Drafting, Engineering, Construction Management, or a similar field (preferred)

Minimum 3+ years’ experience in structural steel/ mining/construction support roles

Demonstrated experience in drafting and estimating support

title: Data Analyst
description:

title: Sales Logistics Coordinator
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Shipping Sales & Booking Coordinator to manage the full commercial and operational cycle of international shipments from the Far East to the USA. This hybrid role requires a mix of active sales/customer acquisition and hands-on shipment coordination.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Growth: Prospect, qualify, and onboard new customers while managing existing accounts.

Quoting & Closing: Prepare freight quotes (FCL, LCL, Air) and negotiate rates to close deals profitably.

Operations: Convert closed deals into bookings and coordinate shipments with overseas agents and carriers.

Documentation: Handle BL instructions, ISF, AMS, invoices, and packing lists.

Tracking: Proactively track shipments and resolve any logistical delays.



Required Qualifications

Experience: 3+ years in international freight forwarding or logistics.

Expertise: Proven experience specifically with Far East to USA shipping routes.

Technical Knowledge: Strong understanding of ocean freight (FCL/LCL), Incoterms, and U.S. import regulations (ISF, AMS).

Sales Ability: Demonstrated success in closing freight sales independently.

Systems: Familiarity with CRM and TMS platforms.

Personal Qualities: Entrepreneurial mindset with a strong sense of ownership. Highly organized, customer-focused, and comfortable working independently.

title: Lead Qualifier — Facebook Marketplace DMs (Remote)
description:
We're a real estate tech company looking for someone sharp to manage and respond to inbound leads on
 Marketplace via Messenger.

What you'll actually be doing:

Your job is to turn inquiries into qualified conversations. You'll be the first touchpoint — responding fast, reading intent, asking the right questions, and filtering out tire-kickers from real opportunities. You'll use AI tools to maintain consistent tone and quality across high volume.

What we're looking for:

 Messenger at volume

You copy-paste the same response to every message

-Monitor performance (CTR, CPA, ROAS) and provide clear reporting

-Improve landing pages and conversion flow with the team

-Stay updated with Google Ads trends and best practices

title: SEO & Website Content Executive
description:
About Us



We operate two UK property finance brands:



Envelop Finance

Fast Property Finance



We help clients and brokers source finance solutions including bridging loans, commercial mortgages and buy-to-let finance.



We are looking for a reliable, hands-on SEO and website content person to help improve our websites, strengthen our search presence, and most importantly improve the quality of enquiries coming through the sites.



This is not a “strategy only” role. We want someone practical who can improve pages, update content, help refine enquiry journeys, and support better quality lead generation.



The Role



You will help improve the SEO, content, structure and conversion performance of our websites.



The goal is not just more traffic. The goal is better pages, clearer user journeys, and better quality enquiries.



Main Responsibilities

Improve on-page SEO across both websites

Update page titles, meta descriptions, headings and internal links

Optimise existing service pages and blog content

Upload and format content in WordPress or our CMS

Suggest and implement page improvements

Help improve enquiry forms and page messaging so applicants better understand what is required before enquiring

Carry out keyword research for relevant finance terms

Identify content gaps and suggest new pages or articles

Refresh old or underperforming content

Support landing page improvements

Monitor rankings, traffic and website performance

Use Google Search Console and GA4 to report on progress

Provide clear weekly updates on tasks completed

Essential Skills

Proven practical SEO experience

Strong written English

Good understanding of on-page SEO

Experience with WordPress or similar CMS

Experience with Google Search Console

Familiarity with GA4 / Google Analytics

Good attention to detail

Able to follow instructions and work independently

Organised and reliable

Preferred Skills

Experience with finance, mortgages, property or lead generation websites

Basic CRO knowledge

Experience improving landing pages or forms

Basic HTML knowledge

Experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush or similar tools

Basic image editing / Canva skills

Important



We are not looking for someone who only produces reports or general strategy documents.



We want someone who can actually improve pages, organise content, tighten up user journeys, and help us generate better quality website enquiries.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A short summary of your SEO experience

Examples of websites you have worked on

What SEO tasks you personally carried out

Examples of pages or content you improved

Your experience with WordPress, Search Console and GA4

Your monthly salary expectation

Your availability to start



Please also include the word Brompton at the top of your application so we know you have read the full advert.



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a small paid test task.

title: DM Setter & Customer Service
description:
We are a credit repair and funding company that helps real people fix their credit, build their profile, and get access to the money they deserve. We're growing fast and need someone who can keep up — someone who actually KNOWS credit, can hold a real conversation, and makes every person feel like they matter.



This is NOT a copy-paste, sound-like-a-bot type of role. If you can't keep it real with people, this isn't for you.



???? WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



• Handling customer service for ongoing credit repair clients — answering questions about their progress, disputes, timelines, and next steps.

• Managing all incoming DMs on Instagram and through ManyChat

• Qualifying the leads and setting them up for an appointment

• Having actual conversations about credit — explaining scores, utilization, removals, approvals, and funding in a way clients actually understand

• Tracking every lead and client inside GoHighLevel (GHL) — updating pipelines, adding notes, and keeping everything organized

• Keeping track of client payment subscriptions — monitoring due dates, failed payments, and renewals.

• Following up with clients on upcoming or overdue subscription renewals via DM or

• Booking qualified leads onto a call with our closer

• Staying in sync with the rest of the team — we move together here



? YOU NEED TO HAVE



• Real knowledge of credit — how scores work, what affects them, how credit repair works, why it matters for funding and approvals. You should be able to answer client questions confidently without sounding like you Googled it 2 minutes ago

• Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) — navigating pipelines, managing contacts, leaving notes, and using it for customer service

• Experience managing Instagram DMs and/or ManyChat flows

• The ability to sound like a HUMAN — warm, relatable, and real. No scripted robot energy. Clients can tell the difference and so can we.

• Strong written communication — fast responses, clear messages, no typos

• Organization — you'll be juggling new leads, existing clients, AND subscription tracking at the same time

• A team player attitude — we have other staff and everyone needs to work together smoothly

• Reliable phone/laptop and solid internet connection



? BONUS IF YOU HAVE



• The ability to hop on a phone call with clients — specifically for subscription renewals, re-engaging clients who've gone quiet, or handling sensitive billing conversations. 

• Background in credit repair and funding.

• Experience in sales or appointment setting

• Knowledge of business credit and funding strategies (tradelines, business credit cards, etc.)

About Us



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in America. We believe in creating a true partnership where our employees act and feel like a true member of the American team they are matched with. Our goal is to help them create a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for their clients and their families. To achieve this, we’re looking for a Helper Hero to join our team and help us shine even brighter!



About You



What sets us apart is YOU. You’re not just any virtual tea
mber—you’re a Helper Hero! If you’re passionate about making a difference, have a knack for organization, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, you’re who we are looking for. If you’re the kind of person who loves tackling behind-the-scenes tasks with a smile, ensuring that our clients' caregivers and clients receive the best possible support, apply today!



Job Overview



We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Recruiter to support recruitment, caregiver

onboarding, and administrative tasks for a growing home care business. This role is

ideal for someone with experience in healthcare recruitment and a passion for

streamlining operations. You will work closely with the owner to alleviate their workload,

enabling them to focus on business growth and client care.



Key Responsibilities



1. Recruitment & Onboarding:



- Manage end-to-end caregiver recruitment: screen applicants, schedule interviews, and coordinate orientation/training.

- Process onboarding documentation via ADP Workforce (e.g., electronic I-9s, employee handbook distribution).

- Track and ensure completion of state-mandated caregiver training (e.g.,via Active Insights).



2. Administrative Support



- Answer inbound calls during peak hours and manage voi
s/lead inquiries.

- Assist with client intake calls and referral source coordination.

- Provide general administrative support (e.g., scheduling, data entry).



3. Systems & Collaboration



- Utilize platforms like WellSky or Axiscare (training provided) to streamline workflows.

- Collaborate with the owner to refine processes and maintain organization.



Qualifications:



- Excellent written/verbal communication (fluent English).

- Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

- Proficiency with CRM systems,
 management, and cloud-based tools (e.g., Google Drive).

- Proactive mindset—anticipate needs before they arise.

- Proven experience in recruitment, specifically in healthcare or home care staffing.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build rapport with candidates and tea
mbers.

- Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a fast-paced environment.

- Familiarity with recruitment platforms and CRM tools

- A positive attitude, sense of humor, and a passion for helping others.



Attributes of a Successful Helper Hero:



- Empathy: You genuinely care about people and want to make a difference in their lives.

- Organization: You’re a master of multitasking and can keep everything running smoothly.

- Communication: You speak impeccable English. You’re a clear and friendly communicator, both written and verbal.

- Problem Solver: You can see the big picture when resolving complex issues and follow through until you reach full resolution.

- Self Starter: You work effectively without supervision and follow processes precisely.

- Reliability: You’re dependable, punctual, and always ready to step up when needed.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us:



- Competitive Base Pay: $6.50/hr for the first 6 months. (Among the highest in the homecare industry)

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best

care possible.

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for

advancement and learning.

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration,

compassion, and a good laugh.



Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated,

have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more

compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s

make a difference together.



IMPORTANT: Directly apply and send your resume on our website: 
/helperheroes/

title: EAN / OA Sourcing Virtual Assistant - Tools Provided & Performance-Based Pay
description:
job Description:

I am looking for a very fast Virtual Assistant for Online Arbitrage sourcing (Europe). The process is completely streamlined: no tedious manual searching. I provide the supplier catalogs, an internal software with a built-in scraper, and the admin performs the final product validation. Your role is to be an ultra-efficient first filter.



Your Workflow (Assembly Line Processing):



Catalog Sourcing: You take EANs from the provided catalogs and run them through SellerAmp.



Quick Visual Check: You instantly verify that there are no IP alerts, it is not a Private Label (PL) product, and the profit is there.



Data Entry: If the visual check passes, you directly input the lead into my proprietary software so I can validate it.



Scraper Sourcing: You will also use the website scraper directly integrated into my software to extract and analyze data even faster.



Strict Performance Quotas (Non-negotiable):



Catalog Sourcing: Minimum 10 valid leads per hour (80 per day).



Scraper Sourcing: Minimum 15 valid leads per hour (120 per day).



Terms of Collaboration:



One-Day Trial Period: We start with a strict 8-hour test. If, at the end of the first day, the minimum quota is not met in the software, the collaboration is terminated on the spot and access is revoked.



Conditioned Compensation: Hourly payment is strictly tied to meeting the quotas. Daily billing will only be approved if the lead volume matches the hours claimed.



How to Apply:

To prove your ability to analyze quickly with SellerAmp, you must attach 2 to 3 examples of OA leads you have personally sourced, including Keepa and SellerAmp screenshots.

Applications without these screenshots will be immediately deleted.

title: Creative Strategist for DTC Brands / Dropshipping
description:
We’re Hiring a Creative Strategist (DTC / Dropshipping)



Flexible Schedule • Performance-Driven • Fast-Moving Creative Team



Hey Creative legends,



We’re an ambitious DTC e-commerce brand scaling aggressively across the UK and Germany. We’ve built past 8 figures without a dedicated Creative Strategist—but with Meta’s Andromeda update reshaping the game, it’s finally time to bring in someone who can own our creative direction.



If you know how to turn attention into conversions, break down angles and hooks, and build ads that actually perform, this role is for you.



This is not just a brief-writing job.

This is a strategic role that drives the entire direction of our creative output—concepts, scripts, research, testing, iteration, insights. If you love storytelling, performance ads, UGC structure, and analyzing what truly works, you’ll thrive here.



What You’ll Do



-Own creative strategy across UK & Germany

-Research hooks, angles, and trends using Meta Ads Library, TikTok, YouTube, and competitor analysis

-Build creative concepts and iterate based on real Meta performance data

- Master VSL copywriting, hooks, and story-driven ad frameworks

-Write clear, actionable creative briefs for editors, designers, and UGC creators

-Manage the creative testing pipeline:

Brainstorm ? Produce ? Test ? Analyze ? Iterate

-Lead and collaborate with a team of video editors

-Work closely with the Media Buyer to analyze CTR, CPC, CPA, CVR, and ROAS

-Use AI tools to speed up research, ideation, scripting, and testing

-Stay ahead of Meta trends (especially post-Andromeda)

-Organize creatives by angle, format, and funnel stage inside Notion / Google Drive



You’re a Great Fit If You:



-Have 2+ years in creative strategy, performance marketing, or DTC/dropshipping

-Understand direct-response psychology and why people click + buy

-Can explain why an ad works—and where the hook or angle comes from

-Are skilled in concept ideation, copywriting, and scripting

-Can manage creative teams and ensure fast, high-quality output

-Thrive in fast-paced, test-heavy environments with multiple product cycles

-Communicate clearly and professionally in English



Weekly Deliverables



-Creative briefs

-Hook & angle research

-VSL scripts

-Creative analysis with next-step recommendations

-Rapid testing and iteration (quality matters, but speed matters too)



???? Salary & Benefits



-$1,500 USD/month

-Performance bonuses tied to creative results

-Long-term role with strong growth potential

-Flexible working hours



???? How to Apply



Please submit your application using the ClickUp Form below:





Applications submitted outside the form will not be reviewed.

     - Pick-ups

     - Returns to sender (RTS)

What We’re Looking For

Strong sense of urgency and accountability



Why Join Us

Work with a fast-scaling dropshipping brand

High-impact role with full ownership of operations

Opportunity to improve systems and make real decisions

title: Senior Funnel Builder - Up to $3.5K USD/month
description:
Senior Funnel Builder - Up to $3.5K USD/month

8-Figure DTC Health & Wellness Brand | Remote (Asian Timezone) 



APPLICATION FORM: 

We will only process candidates who applied via google form.



We’re an eight-figure e-commerce brand in the health and pain relief space. We sell across Shopify and Amazon and move thousands of orders per month.



We’re looking for a senior funnel builder who builds pages that look great and convert.

We don't hire for potential, we hire for what you can already do.





What You’ll Be Doing

-This is a hands-on building role. You’re in the page builder every day making things. You also think about what to build and why — but the core of this job is producing high-quality landing pages and funnel assets.

Day-to-Day:

-Build and optimize landing pages, product pages, and funnel assets

-Design and execute A/B tests — you’ll have input on what to test, build the variants, and help analyze results

-Create and edit visual assets (images, GIFs, graphics) yourself, with a graphic designer available to support

-Contribute to branding strategy — you’re building all our customer-facing pages, so your input on brand direction matters

-Maintain and improve our Shopify storefront (bug fixes, listing updates, theme adjustments)

-Contribute CRO ideas and suggestions — we want your perspective on what’s working and what isn’t



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves:



-A portfolio that speaks for itself. We want to see landing pages you’ve built. Beautiful pages that also convert. If you’ve got conversion data, even better.

-Strong UI/UX instincts. You understand visual hierarchy, buyer psychology, and what makes someone click “Buy Now.” You don’t just build pages — you build pages that sell.

-A/B testing experience. You’ve designed tests, built variants, analyzed results, and know how to make data-driven decisions about what stays and what goes.

-Initiative. You don’t wait for someone to hand you a task. You look at a funnel and say “Here’s what I’d change and here’s why.” You bring ideas, not just execution.

-AI fluency. You actively use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, AI-assisted design tools) in your workflow to move faster and produce higher-quality work. If you’re not using AI in 2026, you’re behind.

-Strong image editing and visual skills. You can create, edit, and refine visual assets yourself. You’ll have a graphic designer to support you, but you’re not waiting on anyone to get things done.



Nice-to-Haves:



-Experience with Shopify, GemPages, or similar e-commerce page builders

-DTC or health/wellness industry experience

-Familiarity with Figma, Canva, or design tools for rapid prototyping

-Why This Role Is Worth Your Attention



Most funnel builder roles are glorified task execution — someone else d
 what to build and you just make it. This one’s different.

-You work directly with the founder. No middle management, no layers. You’re collaborating with the person who makes -decisions, which means your ideas actually get implemented.

-The brand is proven and scaling. Eight figures, thousands of orders per month. You’re not joining a startup hoping to find product-market fit — you’re joining a brand that’s growing and needs to move faster.

-We pay above market. Up to $3.5K USD/month is well above what most companies in the region offer for this role. We do that intentionally because we want the best.



Apply using this application form: 



??We will only process candidates who applied via google form.

title: AI Video Editor
description:

Type: Full-Time or Contract

Company: Stantaro – Social Media Marketing Agency



About Stantaro:



Stantaro is a creative social media marketing agency producing high-performing content for brands across Australia. We specialise in short-form video, storytelling, and ad creatives built to perform on social platforms. As our production workflows evolve, we are integrating AI-assisted video generation alongside professional editing to scale content efficiently while maintaining quality.



Role Overview:

Requirements

Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

Why Work With Us

- Competitive pay based on skill and experience.



Where to Find Us

View our work and creative standards on

title: AI Marketing Operator - Long-term role with Dutch founder (Claude Code + full-stack marketing)
description:
I'm Wilco, the founder of Grow On Repeat. I'm looking for one person to work with me directly and run the marketing side of the business with me. This is a long-term role. I'm not looking for someone for 3 months. I want someone who's still here 5 years from now.



I recorded a short video to introduce myself properly, so you can get a feel for who I am and who I'm looking for (it's not everyone). Watch this first:







And here's a second video. When I sold my last business (UpViral) in 2024, some of my team recorded farewell messages for me. A lot of them are from the Philippines. Some stayed with me for 10+ years ??.



Team compilation video: 
 



### What Grow On Repeat is



Grow On Repeat helps small business owners run full marketing departments using AI. Our product (GrowOS) is a complete marketing system that runs inside Claude Code. Think: newsletters, social posts, ads, articles, community replies, customer support. All built as AI skills. Customers install it and their AI handles 80% of the marketing work.



Right now it's just me running this. I've sold the first batch of customers and the system works. I need one more person on the team. That's you.



### What you'll actually be doing



The short answer: you'll be using AI to run marketing, and building new AI skills when something new is needed.



Day-to-day examples:



- Replying to posts in our Skool community using our AI setup

- Writing and scheduling social posts (X, LinkedIn,
)

- Drafting newsletters and
s

- Creating and managing
 ads

- Handling customer support
s

- Writing blog articles with our AI pipeline

- Building NEW Claude Code skills when we need new workflows



The job will change fast. What you do month 1 will look different from month 6. You need to be comfortable with that and excited by it. Nobody is going to hand you a fixed SOP and leave you alone. We build the SOPs together. You grow the role as the business grows.



### Who I'm looking for



Hard requirements:



- Full-stack marketing background. You've done copy,
, social, SEO, and ads. Not an expert in all of them, but you've touched all of them and you're strong in content.

- Power user of Claude Code or Cowork. You can build your own skills, edit existing ones, and work with MCP tools. If you don't know what a SKILL.md file is, this role isn't for you yet.

- Native or near-native English. You'll be writing copy that goes to our customers and our audience. And you'll be on calls with me.

- Obsessed with AI. You follow the space. You know what dropped last week. You experiment with new tools on your own time because it's fun.

- Self-driven. I can't hand-hold you. You'll get a goal and figure out how to get there. You ask smart questions when stuck.



Nice to have:



- Your own portfolio of posts, articles, or marketing work I can look at

- Past experience running social for a product or brand

- Experience with video editing (Descript, CapCut, or similar)



### What I offer



- Well-paid role. I don't post salary ranges because I pay based on the person, not a band. If you're great, you'll be paid much better than the PH market average. Your video and your application will tell me what you're worth.

- Twice-monthly pay. 15th and 30th. I've paid every person on my teams on time, every single cycle, for 20+ years. No missed days, ever. Ask my old team.

- 13th-month bonus every December.

- Part-time trial to start, full-time once it's working. I want to make sure we're a fit both ways. The trial is paid and real.

- Direct access to me. You won't be buried under a team. You work with me. You'll see how decisions get made in a real business. That's rare.

- A role that grows with you. As the business grows, your scope grows. This is a ground-floor opportunity with a founder who has built and sold multiple companies.



### A bit about me so you know who you'd be working with



I'm Dutch, 22+ years in online business (started at 16). I've built and sold three companies, UpViral being the most recent. 50,000+ customers across 150+ countries. I've spent over $
 million on
 ads personally. I've been featured in 
. I'm endorsed by Ryan Deiss and Russell Brunson.



I'm also a husband and a father of three. I live in the Netherlands and I've been to the Philippines multiple times to meet my teams. I treat the people I work with like family. The team compilation above is from people I had around me for years, not contractors I met last month.



### Dealbreakers (please skip applying if)



- Your English is only OK, not strong

- You haven't actually used Claude Code or Cowork yet

- You're running an agency or have multiple clients (I want focused attention)

- You don't have real work to show me that you did yourself



### How to apply



Fill out this form: 
 



Inside the form, I ask you to record a 2-minute Loom video answering one question: **"Why should I hire you?"**



That video matters more than anything else in the form. I'll watch it before I read your answers. Be yourself. No scripts. No AI-generated intros. Just you on camera telling me why.



One heads up: I'm traveling for the next two weeks, so replies will be slow until early May. Please still apply now. I'll read every application when I'm back and reply to everyone, fit or not. The people who submit early don't lose their spot.



Talk soon,



Wilco de Kreij

title: Marketing Generalist (Mid-level Role)
