We are looking for a Marketing Generalist to independently execute marketing activities across digital platforms. This role combines content creation, social media management, and digital campaign support. You will work closely with the marketing and design team to produce consistent, engaging, and on-brand content across all channels.

This role is ideal for someone with prior experience in marketing, content creation, or design who is ready to take on full ownership of execution and contribute to campaign performance.



Key Responsibilities

Create marketing materials, graphics, and basic video content for social media, ads, campaigns, and internal use

Manage social media accounts, including content scheduling and basic community engagement

Execute
 Ads creatives and support campaign requirements

Write captions and basic marketing copy using strong written English

Translate marketing briefs into effective, publish-ready content

Ensure all content is accurate, consistent, and aligned with brand guidelines

Collaborate closely with the marketing lead to execute campaign strategies

Manage multiple marketing tasks and deadlines with minimal supervision

Monitor content performance and suggest improvements when needed

Handle light administrative and reporting tasks as required



What We’re Looking For

3–5 years of experience in marketing, content creation, or design-related work

Strong portfolio or sample work (social media, ads, or campaigns)

Proficiency in design tools (Adobe Creative Suite or similar)

Strong understanding of social media platforms and content formats

Excellent written English for captions and content writing

Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks

Strong attention to detail and brand consistency

Positive attitude, proactive mindset, and willingness to learn



What Success Looks Like

Independently executes marketing content from brief to final output

Consistently delivers high-quality, on-brand materials

Effectively manages social media and campaign execution

Contributes ideas that improve engagement and performance

Works reliably across multiple projects with minimal supervision



What We Offer:

-Fully remote, long-term role

-Day Shift (6am PH time start) Monday to Friday

-Supportive and professional team environment

-Opportunities for development and skill progression through trainings

-New Zealand public holiday

-Monthly internet subsidy

-Quarterly Bonus

title: AI Sales Performance Strategist
description:
About the Job

This isn't a traditional sales role. We're not looking for someone who can work a CRM and make 50 calls a day. We're looking for someone who uses AI to do what a team of 10 used to do — and then closes the deals themselves.

At Penji, we believe the next generation of sales isn't about working harder. It's about building smarter systems. You'll use AI to deeply understand your ICPs, map their workflows, identify their pain before they say a word, and reach them with messaging so precise it doesn't feel like cold outreach at all. Then you'll close them.

If you've ever thought "I could 10x my output if I just had the right systems" — and then actually built those systems — this role was written for you.



About Penji

Since 2017, Penji has given businesses on-demand access to the top 2% of graphic designers. We're the leader in design subscription services, recognized by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in the country. We're not just building a business — we're building something worth being part of.



What You'll Own

AI-Powered ICP Research & Workflow Mapping

? Use AI to build deep profiles of your ideal prospects — their tools, workflows, team structures, pain points, and buying triggers

? Identify where design bottlenecks live inside an agency or brand before you ever send a message

? Map decision-maker hierarchies and find the right entry point for every account

? Turn a 2-hour research process into a 10-minute one — without losing depth or personalization

Outreach at Massive Scale

? Build and run AI-powered outreach systems across
, LinkedIn, and emerging channels that feel 1:1 even at volume

? Use AI to generate, test, and iterate on messaging angles, subject lines, and hooks faster than any human team could

? Own your own meeting pipeline — no waiting on leads, no excuses. You prospect, you book, you close

? Continuously experiment with new channels and use AI to scale what converts

Sales & Closing

? Run the full sales cycle from first touch to signed contract — demos, objection handling, follow-up, close

? Use AI to anticipate objections before calls, prepare responses, and walk in knowing more about the prospect than they expect

? Maintain a clean, real-time pipeline with next actions on every deal

? Report close rate, deal size, and conversion metrics weekly — and own the numbers

Workflow Building & Continuous Improvement

? Build reusable AI workflows for prospecting, personalization, research, and follow-up that compound over time

? Evaluate new AI sales tools as they launch and implement the ones that give Penji an edge

? Contribute to team prompt libraries, playbooks, and SOPs that raise the floor for everyone

? Get 1?tter every month — in AI, in sales, and in understanding the people you're selling to



What We're Looking For

? 3+ years in sales, business development, or outreach with a proven closing record

? Hands-on experience using AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or equivalent — specifically applied to sales workflows

? Deep understanding of prompt engineering for prospecting, personalization, objection handling, and sequence building

? Experience with outreach platforms and CRMs — Apollo, Instantly, Smartlead, HubSpot, or similar

? Someone who has actually built AI workflows, not just used AI occasionally

? Sharp written communicator — you write copy that gets replies

? Self-directed, metrics-obsessed, and uncomfortable with stagnation

? Bonus: experience in affiliate or influencer marketing



How to Apply

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form: 

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: Funnel Designer
description:
Job Title: Conversion-Focused Funnel Designer (DTC)



We are looking for a meticulous, high-caliber Funnel Designer to join our e-commerce team. This isn’t just about making things look "pretty"—it’s about conversion architecture. You will be responsible for building high-converting marketing funnels that turn cold traffic into loyal customers for our Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) brand.



If you have a "perfectionist" streak, a deep understanding of direct-response design, and the ability to turn complex offers into clear, visual masterpieces, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities

• End-to-End Funnel Construction: Build, launch, and optimize high-converting landing pages, upsells, and checkout flows using drag-and-drop builders.

• Visual Asset Creation: Design high-quality product mockups, including "spread out" offer bundles, digital product previews (e.g., book pages/ebooks), and transparent PNGs that make our offers pop.

• CRO Design: Implement UI/UX best practices specifically tailored for mobile-first DTC shoppers to reduce friction and increase AOV (Average Order Value).

• Brand Consistency: Ensure all funnels align with brand guidelines while pushing the boundaries of performance design.



Requirements

• Proven DTC Experience: You have a portfolio of live funnels that have successfully scaled DTC products.

• Mastery of Design Tools: Expertise in creating marketing assets and mockups (Photoshop, Canva, or Figma).

• Platform Proficiency: Experience with drag-and-drop builders. While we are platform-flexible, specific experience with Funnelish is a major advantage.

• Shopify Ecosystem: Familiarity with Shopify page builders like Replo or Gempages is highly preferred.

• Uncompromising Standards: You have a zero-tolerance policy for sloppiness. Misaligned elements, typos, or broken links are non-existent in your first drafts.



Who You Are

• Detail-Oriented: You notice the pixel that’s out of place and the typo that everyone else missed.

• Efficient: You know how to work quickly within drag-and-drop environments without sacrificing quality.

• Strategic: You understand the why behind a landing page layout, not just the how.



Salary: USD $1,200 to $1,500 per month



Note on Applications: We hold a very high standard for this role. Attention to detail is our primary filter; applications with typos or poor design formatting will be automatically disqualified.



How to Apply: Please submit your application at zurl.to/mRsb?source=CareerSite and include your portfolio link along with a brief description of the highest-converting funnel you’ve ever built.

title: Senior Graphic Designer - (Plushie Brand/Ecommerce/Advertising)
description:
About Capy-Era

We're a fast-growing e-commerce brand obsessed with creating IP characters that people love. Our plushies and apparel bring joy to customers across the US, UK, and Australia. Young team. Big ambitions. Ready to scale.



The Role

Create ads that stop scrolls and drive sales. You'll design high-converting direct response content for
 and Instagram, bringing our characters to life through motion graphics, video, and killer visuals.



Fast-paced? Absolutely. Impactful? 100%.



What You'll Do

Design scroll-stopping ads for
/Instagram that actually convert



Create motion graphics and video content that make our IP characters pop



Edit and retouch product photos to perfection



Iterate fast based on performance data



Juggle multiple projects without breaking a sweat



Keep our brand looking fresh and consistent



What You Need

6+ years crushing it in graphic design (show us your portfolio!)



Skills: graphic design, motion graphics, video editing, photo retouching



Adobe Creative Suite expert (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere Pro)



Clear communicator who works well under pressure



Highly responsible and results-driven



Bonus:



E-commerce/DTC brand experience



You speak fluent performance metrics



Character design background



Why Join?

Young, fast-growing team culture



100% fully remote



Rapid career advancement opportunities



Our Vibe

We move fast, ship often, and celebrate wins together. If you're ready to do the best work of your career and grow with a brand that's going places, let's talk.
